3.question: Is it likely that Nate has friends besides Joanna?

memories.memory: 【Nate and Joanna】April 17, 2022, 06:44 PM: Nate noted they hadn't talked in a while and asked how it was going. Joanna stated she had been reading a lot in the past week and that there are many good books she forgot she owned. Nate added that he probably has loads of books he hasn't read in years, calling it a blast from the past.

【Max】On May 25, 2022, at 03:00 PM, Nate reported that he took Max for a walk, met a nearby couple with a dog who live close by, and they decided to arrange doggy playdates to provide friends for their pets. It is like fate; having a walking buddy for Max will be great, and Max really likes the other dog. Nate expressed gratitude and said he enjoys watching their pets play with one another, and that seeing his dog so happy is like a dream come true. 【Couple on Walk】May 25, 2022, 03:00 PM: Joanna asked Nate whether he got to know the couple very well and what they were like. Nate replied that the couple didn't share a whole lot in common with him besides the love of animals, but that was all they needed to share in common to be good friends.

【Spider-Man Screenplay Debut】Session Date: June 05, 2022. On June 05, 2022 at 02:12 PM, Joanna wrote that yesterday she wrote a few bits for a screenplay that appeared on the big screen yesterday; it was nerve-wracking but inspiring to see her words come alive; an image shared by Joanna showed a Spider-Man poster hanging on a wall. At 02:12 PM, Nate replied with congratulations, saying seeing your hard work pay off must've felt amazing, that it was scary too but awesome, and that you’re so inspiring; by the way, last time we saw each other, I noticed a Spider-Man pin on your purse; is Spider-Man your favorite superhero, or do you have another fave? At 02:12 PM, Joanna replied: Thanks, Nate; it was a real roller coaster, but seeing the hard work pay off was amazing; Spider-Man has always been a favorite of mine—I mean, who doesn't love Peter Parker's struggles between being a hero and being a person? But I'm kind of a sucker for any superhero—everyone has their own rad story and powers; do you have a favorite superhero?

【Nate's Victory】Session Date: June 03, 2022; 05:44 PM. Nate reported that he had been doing great after winning another regional video game tournament last week and meeting some new people, and that connecting with fellow gamers is always awesome. Joanna congratulated Nate on his victory in the tournament, saying it must feel great to be recognized for his gaming skills. Nate thanked Joanna, stating that winning was a huge confidence boost and showed his hard work paid off, and that he is really happy with his progress. 【Joanna's Support】June 03, 2022, 05:44 PM: Joanna: I am as well! It's great to hear from you about your tournaments throughout the years; Nate: Thanks! I has been a while since my first tournament hasn't it? I appreciate your support! Joanna: Anytime Nate! I'm here for you every step of the way. 【Tournament Hangout】Session Date: June 03, 2022. On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Nate said he talked to some of the guys at the tournament afterwards, and they said they wanted to hang out later; an image shared by Nate shows a purple and blue controller with a star field design. On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Joanna said: Sounds like fun! It's good to have friends that share your interests! 【Nate Helps Others】On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Nate stated that he could help because they asked for tips on how to improve their game. Joanna commented that Nate was commendable for helping strangers and that stepping outside one’s comfort zone is always great. 【Weekend Plans】Weekend Plans: On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Nate said, "Thanks, I just like helping people," and asked, "Do you have any plans for the weekend?"

【Joanna's update on a project and inquiry about Nate's activities】On 2022-01-21 at 19:31, Joanna contacted Nate, noting it has been a while since they last connected, saying she has been working on a project lately and that it’s been pretty cool, and asking whether he has any interesting projects or hobbies.

【Nate & Joanna Catch-Up】Session Date: October 21, 2022. October 21, 2022, 02:01 PM: Nate said to Joanna, "Hey Joanna, what's been up? Haven't seen you since we last talked." Joanna replied, "Same here! So have you been up to anything recenly?" 【Joanna's Recipe】October 21, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna stated she has been revising and perfecting the recipe she made for her family, and it turned out really tasty; she asked what has been happening with Nate. 【Nate's Gaming Tournaments】On October 21, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate told Joanna that he has been stressed lately because of his tournament progress and tough competitors, but his turtles cheer him up, and that he has just been practicing for his next video game tournemant; he asked how she is doing.

【Jan 21, 2022: Nate reaches out to Joanna after a long time】On January 21, 2022 at 07:31 PM, Nate texts Joanna, greeting her after a long absence and asking how she is and whether anything fun is going on.

【Nate and Joanna: Hobbies】On January 21, 2022 at 07:31 PM, Nate asked, "It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?" Joanna replied, "Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?" Nate said, "Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies." 【Nate and Joanna: Movie Genres】On January 21, 2022, 07:31 PM, Joanna said that Nate and she have similar interests and asked what type of movies he likes best; Nate replied that he loves action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool, and asked what Joanna's favorite genre is; Joanna said she is all about dramas and romcoms and loves getting immersed in the feelings and plots.

【Cork Board Plan】Cork Board Plan; Session Date: June 05, 2022. At 02:12 PM, Nate said he really should start a cork board of his own, and that it seems like a really valuable thing. Joanna replied that she would definitely recommend it, as long as you're willing to explain what it is to your friends.

【Joanna and Nate: Supportive Journey】On May 25, 2022 at 03:00 PM, Joanna said that thinking back to the tough times finishing her screenplay made her realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it. Nate replied that those little moments make it all worth it, especially during tough times, and that enjoying the ride is key. Joanna added that appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer, keeping them focused on their dreams, and she can't wait to show it to him, valuing his opinion. Nate said he can't wait to see it and that he's here to support her. Joanna expressed appreciation for Nate's support and said she'll keep him updated. Nate encouraged her: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up.

3.mflow_response: Yes, he has other friends.

Nate replied that he would love to share it and that they should spread the joy of dairy-free options, and he asked Joanna to let him know when she makes it. He complimented Joanna on a chocolate cake with raspberries image, said he needs to try baking it, asked what other treats she likes making, and how she made the cake. He expressed interest in trying that dessert and thanked Joanna. 【Joanna - Dairy-free Desserts】On September 14, 2022, 01:43 PM, Joanna stated that dairy-free is a must for desserts, noted that last Friday she made a deeeelish dessert with almond milk and it was good, and asked Nate for favorite dairy-free desserts. Joanna identified her favorite dairy-free treat as a chocolate raspberry tart with an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries; Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top. Joanna also loves making a dairy-free chocolate cake with raspberries, described as moist and delicious with perfect sweetness; Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a piece of chocolate cake with raspberries on a plate. She makes the cake with almond flour, coconut oil, chocolate and raspberries, and it is her favorite for birthdays and special days. Joanna provided another recipe: a delicious dessert made with blueberries, coconut milk, and a gluten-free crust, so creamy and delicious; Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a piece of cake with walnuts on top. Joanna closed by saying, Glad to help, Nate; let me know if you try it; I’m sure you’ll enjoy it; it was great chatting.

memories.memory: 【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna's Writing】On August 14, 2022, at 06:12 PM, Joanna stated she has been busy with writing projects and going all out; writing is a huge part of her now, with her journal as her rock, and it has been the best thing ever, a mix of highs and lows. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it. She added that writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, giving her a chance to put all her thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it; words have a magical way of healing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper. Last week, someone wrote her a letter after reading an online blog post she made about a hard moment in her life; their words touched her, they said her story had brought them comfort, and it was awesome to realize her words had that kind of power, reminding her why she loves writing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper. She expressed appreciation for Nate's kind words, saying that knowing her writing can make a difference keeps her going even on tough days, and that this outlet to share her stories and hopefully have an impact is valuable. 【Nate's Support】Session Date: August 14, 2022, 06:12 PM. Joanna said, definitely let's keep making great memories and supporting each other, keep reaching for our dreams and make them happen; image shared by Joanna shows two women sitting on a bed laughing.

【Joanna】2022年8月22日 上午10:57，Joanna 表示她在上周向写作小组分享自己的书时非常紧张，但收到了很好的反馈；她的努力正在得到回报，感觉非常好。图像：Joanna 分享的桌子、椅子和一台电脑的照片。

2022年8月22日 上午10:57，Nate 表示 Joanna 正在大放异彩，认为这类反馈意味着读者确实在她的写作上产生了联系，问她是否庆祝。图像：Nate 分享的照片：柜台上的一杯玻璃甜点。

2022年8月22日 上午10:57，Joanna 回应称感谢，觉得人们喜欢她的写作；她通过制作这份甜点来庆祝。图像：Joanna 分享的照片：两份甜点带勺子和一块巧克力。
[August 22, 2022, 10:57 AM] Joanna: I'm good! Was

【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna Stage Experience】[Joanna Stage Experience]
[Session Date: April 21, 2022]

On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Joanna stated that nerves and excitement on stage are a rush; she recalled her first play, when she was so nervous she forgot her lines, which was embarrassing but taught the importance of preparation and staying in the moment. An image shared by Joanna shows a man in a striped suit performing on stage. At 07:44 PM, Nate replied that it sounds like you had an interesting time on stage and that it's always a learning experience, and asked whether you have considered going back to acting and whether that is you in the photo. 【Joanna's Creative Path】Session Date: April 21, 2022. At 07:44 PM, Joanna states that acting was her first passion, but she now shines in writing, which expresses her in a new way, and she may return to acting someday—never say never. At 07:44 PM, Nate says: Go for it; follow your passion for writing, but if acting truly makes you happy, give it a shot as well; who knows what'll happen. Nate shares an image: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. At 07:44 PM, Joanna says she will keep writing, but if acting calls out she might give it a try; she really enjoys dramas and emotionally-driven films, and she asks what inspires Nate's passion. 【Nate's Entertainment Choices】On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Nate stated that he loves fantasy and sci-fi movies, they are a great escape and get his imagination going, and that playing video games is a great way to express his creativity and passion. Image shared by Nate: a photography of a black xbox controller sitting on top of a wooden table.

【Joanna's Writing】On August 14, 2022, at 06:12 PM, Joanna stated she has been busy with writing projects and going all out; writing is a huge part of her now, with her journal as her rock, and it has been the best thing ever, a mix of highs and lows. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it. She added that writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, giving her a chance to put all her thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it; words have a magical way of healing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper. Last week, someone wrote her a letter after reading an online blog post she made about a hard moment in her life; their words touched her, they said her story had brought them comfort, and it was awesome to realize her words had that kind of power, reminding her why she loves writing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper. She expressed appreciation for Nate's kind words, saying that knowing her writing can make a difference keeps her going even on tough days, and that this outlet to share her stories and hopefully have an impact is valuable. 【Nate's Support】Session Date: August 14, 2022, 06:12 PM. Nate stated to Joanna that writing can be a path to solace and creativity and that an activity can become a part of our lives, and that she is inspiring; he asked whether writing is her route to solace and creativity. He added that it's really cool and that words can turn something sad into something special, expressed that it worked for her, and asked if anything cool has happened recently. He concluded that Joanna's work is nice, that it must feel sureal, and that she is changing lives.

【Nate's Victory】Session Date: June 03, 2022; 05:44 PM. Nate reported that he had been doing great after winning another regional video game tournament last week and meeting some new people, and that connecting with fellow gamers is always awesome. Joanna congratulated Nate on his victory in the tournament, saying it must feel great to be recognized for his gaming skills. Nate thanked Joanna, stating that winning was a huge confidence boost and showed his hard work paid off, and that he is really happy with his progress. 【Joanna's Support】June 03, 2022, 05:44 PM: Joanna: I am as well! It's great to hear from you about your tournaments throughout the years; Nate: Thanks! I has been a while since my first tournament hasn't it? I appreciate your support! Joanna: Anytime Nate! I'm here for you every step of the way. 【Tournament Hangout】Session Date: June 03, 2022. On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Nate said he talked to some of the guys at the tournament afterwards, and they said they wanted to hang out later; an image shared by Nate shows a purple and blue controller with a star field design. On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Joanna said: Sounds like fun! It's good to have friends that share your interests! 【Nate Helps Others】On June 03, 2022 at 05:44 PM, Nate stated that he could help because they asked for tips on how to improve their game. Joanna commented that Nate was commendable for helping strangers and that stepping outside one’s comfort zone is always great. 【Weekend Plans】Weekend Plans: On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Nate said, "Thanks, I just like helping people," and asked, "Do you have any plans for the weekend?"

【Stuffed Animal Gift】On May 25, 2022 at 03:00 PM, Joanna stated that a peaceful presence around could relieve stress and that having someone or something to come home to for a sense of calm would aid relaxation. At 03:00 PM, Nate said it's great and that he got this new pup for Joanna, sharing an image of a stuffed animal lying on a bed. Joanna said the stuffed animal is cute and she loves the thought. Nate said it's a stuffed animal to remind you of the good vibes. Joanna said she'll cherish that little guy with all her heart. Nate said it's like having joy in your pocket and it always makes him grin when he looks at it. Joanna said it's great, appreciates the small joys like that cute stuffed animal, and it's a nice reminder. Nate agreed that those little things make life better. Joanna said she'll always remember those moments that bring us happiness and remind us that life is great. Nate stated it's about finding those little things and cherishing them, otherwise it's easy to get down.

【DIY bookmark】On October 06, 2022, at 11:15 AM, Joanna stated that she would cherish it and that she had finished a cute bookmark for one of the ladies at her writing club; an image shared by Joanna showed a bookmark with a plant on top of it. Nate said the bookmark is great and that he is sure she'll love it. Joanna stated that she absolutley loves DIYs, and that she knows the recipient does too. Nate asked to be told how it goes. Joanna replied, Sure thing.

3.mflow_response: She writes them down in notebooks.

3.question: What Console does Nate own?
3.gold_answer: A Nintendo Switch; since the game "Xenoblade 2" is made for this console.

memories.memory:
【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？
[November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Hope 【Nate's Gaming Setup】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate upgraded some of his equipment at home and shared an image of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard. Joanna asked whether he uses that computer for gaming. Nate replied, yes, this is where he practices and competes, and he sometimes uses it when playing games with friends. Joanna noted that having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help him stay focused. Nate stated that he loves it and that it's like his own little haven to escape into the virtual world, and shared an image of a desk with two monitors and a laptop. Joanna said it sounds great to have his own gaming setup at home; it must be awesome. Nate concluded that it really is and that it's also really important for his career, otherwise he would never be able to beat his competition, and shared an image of a pair of headphones and a video game controller. 【Xeonoblade Chronicles & Nintendo】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna asked Nate what his favorite game was. Nate replied that he is currently playing the fantasy RPG Xeonoblade Chronicles and that it’s been a blast; he highly reccomend it if you’ve never played it before. Image shared by Nate: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people. Joanna asked what made him start playing it and whether Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series. Nate confirmed that Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series, said he is a big fan of Nintendo games, and explained that he had actually been wanting to play this one for a while because his friends have played it and reccomended it. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass. Joanna noted that it’s nice when a friend’s reccomendation fits your taste well. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum. Nate concluded that it’s true, and that he loves when Joanna gives him movie reccomendations, usually liking them more then if he were to just watch some random one.

【The Lord of the Rings】Session Date: May 02, 2022. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Joanna said, "Hey Nate, how's it going? I took your reccomendation and watched "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy last night! It was awesome!" Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a book openhemer. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Nate replied, "Glad to hear you enjoyed it! It's probably the greatest trilogy of all time! As for me, life's been ok, just taking care of this." Image shared by Nate: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair. 【Street Fighter Tournament】Session Date: May 02, 2022. On May 02, 2022 at 11:54 AM, Joanna praised Nate's progress and noted that his gaming room looked great, asking whether he had been gaming a lot recently. Nate stated that gaming had been his focus, with extensive practice and winning a few tournaments; last week he won his second tournament. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman with purple hair and a black dress. Joanna asked what game he was playing. Nate replied that he usually plays CS:GO, but tried his hand at the local Street Fighter tournament this time since he plays that game a lot with his friends, and turns out he's really good. Joanna asked how it felt to win. Nate said it was super awesome, with a lot of adrenaline in the last match, and the other finalist even shook my hand.

【Nate's Gaming Party】Session Date: June 03, 2022. At 05:44 PM on June 03, 2022, Nate stated he is organizing a gaming party two weekends later, and it will be hectic but fun. Joanna responded, "Sounds like fun, Nate! I wish you the best on your party. Have a blast!" 【Inviting Tournament Friends】On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Joanna asked, "Are you going to invite your tournament friends?", and Nate replied, "Definitely! And some old friends and teamates from other tournaments." 【Custom Controller Decorations】Custom Controller Decorations. Session Date: June 03, 2022. On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Nate told Joanna, "Thanks Joanna! I'm sure it'll be a blast. I'm even getting everyone custom controller decorations just for coming!" Joanna replied, "Wow, I bet they'll love that! What a sweet idea."

【Tournament winnings】October 06, 2022, 11:15 AM: Nate stated that he won a really big video game tournament last week and earned a lot of money from it, and he shared an image showing a trophy and a game controller on a table. Joanna congratulated him and asked if he saved the prize for something special. Nate replied that he saved some money but has no big plans, is content, and it is nice to have the extra cash on hand. Joanna noted that having extra cash on hand brings a sense of freedom and relaxation. Nate concluded that he is not stressed and can enjoy his movies and games.

【Nate & Joanna Catch-Up】Session Date: October 21, 2022. October 21, 2022, 02:01 PM: Nate said to Joanna, "Hey Joanna, what's been up? Haven't seen you since we last talked." Joanna replied, "Same here! So have you been up to anything recenly?" 【Joanna's Recipe】October 21, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna stated she has been revising and perfecting the recipe she made for her family, and it turned out really tasty; she asked what has been happening with Nate. 【Nate's Gaming Tournaments】On October 21, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate told Joanna that he has been stressed lately because of his tournament progress and tough competitors, but his turtles cheer him up, and that he has just been practicing for his next video game tournemant; he asked how she is doing.

【Nate's Gaming Outlook】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Nate reports that his game tournament was pushed back, he tried cooking, and shared a photo of homemade coconut ice cream with sprinkles that changed the color. Joanna comments that it looks yummy, she can’t try it right now, and asks how the last game tournament went. Nate says the tournament was tough and he didn’t make the finals; but that’s okay, he’ll get ’em next time. Joanna notes that it’s a bummer, but staying positive, and asks what his next move in gaming is. Nate says he’s thinking of joining a new gaming team after this next tourney, he’s had a few offers but hasn’t decided yet; it’s gonna be a big step, but he’s ready for a shake up. Joanna says making a switch could open up new opportunities and wishes him luck with picking the right team. Nate thanks her, says it’s a big decision but he’s excited for what the future holds, and asks what’s happening on her end.

【Joanna Stage Experience】[Joanna Stage Experience]
[Session Date: April 21, 2022]

On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Joanna stated that nerves and excitement on stage are a rush; she recalled her first play, when she was so nervous she forgot her lines, which was embarrassing but taught the importance of preparation and staying in the moment. An image shared by Joanna shows a man in a striped suit performing on stage. At 07:44 PM, Nate replied that it sounds like you had an interesting time on stage and that it's always a learning experience, and asked whether you have considered going back to acting and whether that is you in the photo. 【Joanna's Creative Path】Session Date: April 21, 2022. At 07:44 PM, Joanna states that acting was her first passion, but she now shines in writing, which expresses her in a new way, and she may return to acting someday—never say never. At 07:44 PM, Nate says: Go for it; follow your passion for writing, but if acting truly makes you happy, give it a shot as well; who knows what'll happen. Nate shares an image: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. At 07:44 PM, Joanna says she will keep writing, but if acting calls out she might give it a try; she really enjoys dramas and emotionally-driven films, and she asks what inspires Nate's passion. 【Nate's Entertainment Choices】On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Nate stated that he loves fantasy and sci-fi movies, they are a great escape and get his imagination going, and that playing video games is a great way to express his creativity and passion. Image shared by Nate: a photography of a black xbox controller sitting on top of a wooden table.

【Nate's YouTube gaming idea】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate stated that creating gaming content for YouTube is a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy his video game cravings when there aren’t any tournaments going on; image shared by Nate shows a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone. Joanna asked what inspired Nate to start making gaming videos. Nate replied that he is a big fan of gaming videos and thought it would be fun to start making them himself, hoping to share his love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too. 【Joanna's guidance】On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna acknowledged Nate's activity in making videos and connecting with people about gaming. Nate said it's new to him but he's excited to get started. Joanna advised him to watch other peoples videos first to understand what his audience likes, so his videos do not flop when posted. Nate stated that he is already doing that.

【Nate's Achievements】Session Date: August 22, 2022. At 10:57 AM on August 22, 2022, Nate stated that he was stoked to see all his hard work paying off and proud of what he accomplished. He noted that his little dudes got a new tank. An image shared by Nate shows a fish tank with a fish inside. 【Nate's Companions】Session Date: August 22, 2022. At 10:57 AM, Joanna observed that Nate's companions are adorable and have more room to swim now due to the tank expansion. Nate stated that they are his little buddies, always calm and peaceful, and that the tank expansion has made them so happy, which makes coming home after a long day of gaming better.

【Nate's international tournament victory】On August 22, 2022, at 10:57 AM, Nate announced that he had won an international tournament yesterday; it was wild, and gaming has brought him so much success and now he is able to make a living at something he is passionate about, and he loves it. Joanna congratulated Nate, saying she is proud of him for winning the tournament, that it's awesome, and that turning his passion into a career must feel great.

3.mflow_response: He owns an Xbox console.

memories.memory: 【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Joanna stated that the screenplay is a mix of drama and romance. 【Nate】On January 23, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate asked Joanna how she felt now that it's finished and whether she had any new plans for it. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

【Turtles】On March 18, 2022 at 06:59 PM, Joanna asked why Nate chose turtles as pets after noting a photo of three turtles sitting on rocks in a pond. Nate replied that he is drawn to turtles because they are unique, their slow pace is a nice change from the rush of life, they are low-maintenance and calming, and he shared the image of three turtles on rocks in a pond. Joanna asked whether caring for them is tough. Nate answered that it is not, requiring only to keep their area clean, feed them properly, and ensure they get enough light, and he finds it actually fun. Joanna said having pets must be a wonderful experience. Nate stated that pets bring tons of joy, are always there, and are cute, and relaxing with them is a great way to chill. Nate apologized and suggested there might be other animals to consider; in the meantime, he would send pictures of his turtles so she can watch them grow without getting too close. Joanna replied that it's a great idea and she is already really invested in those little guys. 【Cockroaches】March 18, 2022, 06:59 PM: Joanna stated that she wishes she weren't allergic, would get two turtles today if she could, and recently learned she is allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if she'll ever get a pet. 【Nate】Session Date: March 18, 2022. March 18, 2022, 06:59 PM: Nate says it's normal to have doubts, but you've worked hard and put tons of passion into it; believe in yourself and things will work out. Here, look at this cute pic - walking them always reminds me to enjoy the small stuff. Image shared by Nate: a photography of two tortoises laying on the ground in a jungle.

Joanna said that pets make life better and that Max is bringing him joy. 【Allergies and Alternatives】Session Date: May 20, 2022. Nate responded that it's unfortunate, acknowledged the joy pets bring to others, and asked how she finds comfort when she doesn't have any.

memories.memory: 【Joanna's Movie Premiere】On October 25, 2022, at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna what's been up since they last chatted. Joanna replied that another movie script she contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time; it was such a surreal experience, she felt a mix of emotions but overall a satisfying moment, and she had been waiting for this for a long time. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it. Nate congratulated Joanna and asked how it was to finally see it on the big screen, sharing a photo holding a videogame controller; Image shared by Nate: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it. Joanna said: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome! Nate asked: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it? Joanna answered: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it. 【Joanna's Drawings】October 25, 2022, 08:16 PM: Nate complimented Joanna on her drawings and asked what inspired her to create them. Joanna replied that they are visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in her head so she can write better. 【Joanna's Idea Origins】Joanna's Idea Origins. Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM, Nate asked, "That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?" At 08:16 PM, Joanna replied, "I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes." 【Joanna's Movie-Watching Plan】Session Date: October 25, 2022. On October 25, 2022 at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna about the character on the left in the photo. Joanna replied, "You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself." Nate stated he was already planning to watch it, and that discussing it made him want to watch it even more. 【Joanna & Nate: Personal Catch-Up】Session: Joanna & Nate — Personal Catch-Up; Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM on October 25, 2022, Joanna said: "Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?"

【Nate and Joanna】April 17, 2022, 06:44 PM: Nate noted they hadn't talked in a while and asked how it was going. Joanna stated she had been reading a lot in the past week and that there are many good books she forgot she owned. Nate added that he probably has loads of books he hasn't read in years, calling it a blast from the past.

【Joanna and Nate: Supportive Journey】On May 25, 2022 at 03:00 PM, Joanna said that thinking back to the tough times finishing her screenplay made her realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it. Nate replied that those little moments make it all worth it, especially during tough times, and that enjoying the ride is key. Joanna added that appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer, keeping them focused on their dreams, and she can't wait to show it to him, valuing his opinion. Nate said he can't wait to see it and that he's here to support her. Joanna expressed appreciation for Nate's support and said she'll keep him updated. Nate encouraged her: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up.

【Nate and Joanna: Hobbies】On January 21, 2022 at 07:31 PM, Nate asked, "It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?" Joanna replied, "Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?" Nate said, "Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies." 【Nate and Joanna: Movie Genres】On January 21, 2022, 07:31 PM, Joanna said that Nate and she have similar interests and asked what type of movies he likes best; Nate replied that he loves action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool, and asked what Joanna's favorite genre is; Joanna said she is all about dramas and romcoms and loves getting immersed in the feelings and plots.

【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Nate & Joanna Support】On October 06, 2022 at 11:15 AM, Joanna said she enjoyed it, had recommended it a while back, watched it too, and that themes of sisterhood, love, and chasing dreams were explored well; she finished writing her book last week after a ton of late nights and edits and is proud, cannot wait to see what happens next. Nate congratulated Joanna, noting it took effort and that it will be great. Joanna stated that dedication and late nights got her here, but it was worth it, drawing a parallel to Nate's recent tournament—hard work pays off—and expressing appreciation for his support throughout. Nate said he is always here for Joanna, that she has worked hard and accomplished a lot, and that he is proud; keep going. Joanna said she won't give up on her goals as long as you're here to support me. Joanna added that Nate's encouragement is sweet and that she will remember it when she needs encouragement the most. Nate said encouragement is what got him so far in his gameing career, so he shares the love. 【Nate's Whiteboard Gift】在 Session Date: October 06, 2022 的对话中，2022 年 10 月 6 日 11:15 AM，Nate 表示：“You can always count on me! memories.memory: 【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Image shared by Joanna: a photography of a book with a page of text on it. Nate expressed excitement and asked what it's about. Joanna stated that the screenplay is a mix of drama and romance. 【Nate】On January 23, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate asked Joanna how she felt now that it's finished and whether she had any new plans for it. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

【Tournament】On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on winning the tournament, noting that he must have been buzzing, and stated she has been working on something exciting; last Friday she finished the presentation for producers, which was tough but is looking good. She asked what Nate had been up to. Joanna shared an image: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter. 【Joanna's Screenwriting】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：08:10 PM。 Joanna 表示正在写另一部电影剧本，一部充满挑战的爱情故事，投入了大量心血，期望能在大银幕上映；她感谢 Nate，称写作一直是她的热情，且这部剧本的灵感来自一个梦，并询问 Nate 的乌龟近况，表示好久没看到它们的照片。她还说创造故事并让它们栩栩如生给她带来幸福和充实，写作一直是她的祝福；她提到实际上上周又提交了几份作品，期望很快得到回复，尽管她预计其中会有一些被拒绝。她再次感谢 Nate，表示感激鼓励并发誓不会放弃，说 Got it covered!；她还说很高兴听到这个消息！她刚完成下一部电影剧本的序章，并决定在 begining 加入这一段。 [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man] 【Nate's Encouragement】[Nate's Encouragement]
[Session Date: November 07, 2022]

On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate told Joanna: "Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. He added: "Well with dedication like yours, its no wonder you do so well in it as well! Are you planning on submitting anymore scripts anytime soon?" He concluded: "Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!"

【Joanna's Screenplay】On February 25, 2022, at 01:07 PM, Joanna told Nate that she can’t stop thinking about the screenplay and started writing another one while waiting to hear back about how the first did, and she complimented his cooking. Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Joanna advised: get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure it’s really fluffy; also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. She also shared an image: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench. Nate acknowledged that Joanna had really gotten into making her living room and said he’ll try those suggestions. Joanna added that she gets super invested in random little things like that, but it’s all worth it when she ends up with random little things that make life so much nicer. Nate thanked her for the tip.

Definitely a good one!"

【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？
[November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Hope 【Nate's Gaming Setup】Session Date: November 07, 2022. Joanna noted that having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help him stay focused. Nate stated that he loves it and that it's like his own little haven to escape into the virtual world, and shared an image of a desk with two monitors and a laptop. Joanna said it sounds great to have his own gaming setup at home; it must be awesome. Nate concluded that it really is and that it's also really important for his career, otherwise he would never be able to beat his competition, and shared an image of a pair of headphones and a video game controller. 【Xeonoblade Chronicles & Nintendo】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna asked Nate what his favorite game was. Nate replied that he is currently playing the fantasy RPG Xeonoblade Chronicles and that it’s been a blast; he highly reccomend it if you’ve never played it before. Image shared by Nate: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people. Joanna asked what made him start playing it and whether Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series. Nate confirmed that Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series, said he is a big fan of Nintendo games, and explained that he had actually been wanting to play this one for a while because his friends have played it and reccomended it. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass. Joanna noted that it’s nice when a friend’s reccomendation fits your taste well. Nate concluded that it’s true, and that he loves when Joanna gives him movie reccomendations, usually liking them more then if he were to just watch some random one.

【The Lord of the Rings】Session Date: May 02, 2022. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Joanna said, "Hey Nate, how's it going? I took your reccomendation and watched "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy last night! It was awesome!" Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a book openhemer. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Nate replied, "Glad to hear you enjoyed it! 【Nate's Gaming Outlook】Session Date: November 09, 2022. 在 October 09, 2022, 10:58 AM，Nate 表示他大多在家放松，玩电子游戏或看电影有助于他放松；Nate 发送的图片是一张书架摆满 dvds 和电影的照片。Joanna 回应：听起来很棒！你最近看过的最喜欢的游戏或电影是什么？Nate 回答：我最近看了一部充满扭曲情节和梦境元素的电影，我记得它好像叫做“Inception”；我也一直在不停地玩一款拥有伟大未来感设定和玩法的游戏，叫做“Cyberpunk 2077”；你最近有没有看过或玩过什么好玩的？Joanna 回应：我前几天看了一部经典电影，太棒了——故事扣人心弦，演员也很出色，真的给我留下了深刻印象；[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带签名照片的装裱电影海报] Nate 问道：哇，那一定很棒！你会给它打几分？Joanna 回答：嗯，真的很棒，可能是9或10分（满分为10分）！电影能带我们去不同的地方，让我们感受大量情感。你爱看电影的原因是什么？Nate 回答：它们把我带到新的世界，充满情感；而且在一天结束后，它们也很适合放松。Joanna 同意：它们有把我们带离现实、让我们体验日常生活中不常感受的情感的力量，这是一个很棒的逃离，尤其是当你有这样的房间时！[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带电视和蜡烛的客厅照片] 【Living Room Setup】On October 09, 2022, at 10:58 AM, Nate stated that the living room is very comfy and that he should get a setup like that. Joanna replied that it is better to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, she feels so at peace. Nate asked for pointers on what to get to make his living room as comfy as that. Joanna advised: get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure it’s really fluffy; also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. She also shared an image: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench. Nate acknowledged that Joanna had really gotten into making her living room and said he’ll try those suggestions. Joanna added that she gets super invested in random little things like that, but it’s all worth it when she ends up with random little things that make life so much nicer. Nate thanked her for the tip.

Nate stated that he is already doing that.

3.question: What is Joanna's third screenplay about?

memories.memory: 【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Image shared by Joanna: a photography of a book with a page of text on it. Nate expressed excitement and asked what it's about. Joanna stated that the screenplay is a mix of drama and romance. 【Nate】On January 23, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate asked Joanna how she felt now that it's finished and whether she had any new plans for it. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

【Joanna's Screenplay】On February 25, 2022, at 01:07 PM, Joanna told Nate that she can’t stop thinking about the screenplay and started writing another one while waiting to hear back about how the first did, and she complimented his cooking. Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Nate closed by saying Crossing my fingers for you, hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due, good luck!

【Tournament】On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on winning the tournament, noting that he must have been buzzing, and stated she has been working on something exciting; last Friday she finished the presentation for producers, which was tough but is looking good. She asked what Nate had been up to. Joanna shared an image: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter. 【Joanna's Screenwriting】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：08:10 PM。 Joanna 表示正在写另一部电影剧本，一部充满挑战的爱情故事，投入了大量心血，期望能在大银幕上映；她感谢 Nate，称写作一直是她的热情，且这部剧本的灵感来自一个梦，并询问 Nate 的乌龟近况，表示好久没看到它们的照片。她还说创造故事并让它们栩栩如生给她带来幸福和充实，写作一直是她的祝福；她提到实际上上周又提交了几份作品，期望很快得到回复，尽管她预计其中会有一些被拒绝。她再次感谢 Nate，表示感激鼓励并发誓不会放弃，说 Got it covered!；她还说很高兴听到这个消息！她刚完成下一部电影剧本的序章，并决定在 begining 加入这一段。 [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man] 【Nate's Encouragement】[Nate's Encouragement]
[Session Date: November 07, 2022]

You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. He concluded: "Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!"

3.question: What are Joanna's plans for her finished screenplay in January 2022?
3.gold_answer: submit it to film festivals and get producers and directors to check it out

memories.memory: 【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Image shared by Joanna: a photography of a book with a page of text on it. Nate expressed excitement and asked what it's about. Joanna stated that the screenplay is a mix of drama and romance. 【Nate】On January 23, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate asked Joanna how she felt now that it's finished and whether she had any new plans for it. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

【Joanna's Screenplay】On February 25, 2022, at 01:07 PM, Joanna told Nate that she can’t stop thinking about the screenplay and started writing another one while waiting to hear back about how the first did, and she complimented his cooking. Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Nate closed by saying Crossing my fingers for you, hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due, good luck!

【Tournament】On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on winning the tournament, noting that he must have been buzzing, and stated she has been working on something exciting; last Friday she finished the presentation for producers, which was tough but is looking good. Joanna identified her favorite dairy-free treat as a chocolate raspberry tart with an almond flour crust, chocolate ganache, and fresh raspberries; Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a chocolate tart with raspberries on top. 3.gold_answer: personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery

memories.memory: 【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! 【Inception】[Inception]
[Session Date: October 09, 2022]

在 October 09, 2022, 10:58 AM，Nate 表示他大多在家放松，玩电子游戏或看电影有助于他放松；Nate 发送的图片是一张书架摆满 dvds 和电影的照片。Joanna 回应：听起来很棒！你最近看过的最喜欢的游戏或电影是什么？Nate 回答：我最近看了一部充满扭曲情节和梦境元素的电影，我记得它好像叫做“Inception”；我也一直在不停地玩一款拥有伟大未来感设定和玩法的游戏，叫做“Cyberpunk 2077”；你最近有没有看过或玩过什么好玩的？Joanna 回应：我前几天看了一部经典电影，太棒了——故事扣人心弦，演员也很出色，真的给我留下了深刻印象；[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带签名照片的装裱电影海报] Nate 问道：哇，那一定很棒！你会给它打几分？Joanna 回答：嗯，真的很棒，可能是9或10分（满分为10分）！电影能带我们去不同的地方，让我们感受大量情感。你爱看电影的原因是什么？Nate 回答：它们把我带到新的世界，充满情感；而且在一天结束后，它们也很适合放松。Joanna 同意：它们有把我们带离现实、让我们体验日常生活中不常感受的情感的力量，这是一个很棒的逃离，尤其是当你有这样的房间时！[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带电视和蜡烛的客厅照片] 【Living Room Setup】On October 09, 2022, at 10:58 AM, Nate stated that the living room is very comfy and that he should get a setup like that. Joanna replied that it is better to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, she feels so at peace. Nate asked for pointers on what to get to make his living room as comfy as that. Joanna advised: get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure it’s really fluffy; also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. She also shared an image: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench. Nate acknowledged that Joanna had really gotten into making her living room and said he’ll try those suggestions. Joanna added that she gets super invested in random little things like that, but it’s all worth it when she ends up with random little things that make life so much nicer. Nate thanked her for the tip.

【Turtles】会话日期：2022-09-05。2022-09-05 18:03，Nate 表示好久不谈，发生了很多事，看它们有多可爱，和它们在一起在最近特别有帮助；他在一次电子游戏锦标赛中遭遇挫折，尽管努力但表现不佳，这是一次挫折，但他正努力保持积极；图片：两只乌龟坐在池塘边的岩石上的照片。2022-09-05 18:03，Joanna 回复：乌龟很可爱，挫折令人失望，是否有积极的运气向你靠拢？她刚重做了一份旧食谱并做了这个，图片：草莓和巧克力的蛋糕照片。2022-09-05 18:03，Nate 回应：确实不理想地没做好，但这是学习曲线的一部分；另外那看起来很棒；无论如何，你最近怎么样？
[September 05, 2022, 06:03 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Long 【Desserts】2022年9月5日 18:03，Joanna 与 Nate 的 Desserts 会话记录如下：Joanna 表示自己还好，正在改良一个甜点配方及其他几个配方，感到安慰并获得创意。Nate 询问她还在做什么，并说在她处于这种情绪时看到她的作品总是很有满足感。Joanna 表示她正在调整一个甜点配方，使其更美味且更易做。Nate 询问她在尝试哪些口味。Joanna 表示正在尝试巧克力、覆盆子和椰子口味。Nate 询问她是否只在尝试无乳制品选项。Joanna 表示因为乳糖不耐症，她正在尝试无乳制品选项，如椰子奶或杏仁奶，并提到她做了无乳巧克力椰子杯子蛋糕，覆盆子糖霜，并分享了一张照片：一盘杯子蛋糕，表面有不同的装饰。Nate 表示看起来很棒，问她是否还有更多美味的配方。Joanna 表示她已经制作了各种适合所有人饮食的甜点——曲奇、派、蛋糕等，并将很快分享更多配方。 【Meetups】Session Date: September 05, 2022. At 06:03 PM, Nate stated, Can't wait to try them. Can I join you sometime?, and shared [Image shared by Nate: a photo of a pile of cookies with sprinkles on a wooden table]. Joanna asked for more tips for dairy-free baking. Nate replied, You can use dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter, and check the labels to ensure they're dairy-free. Good luck! [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a cookie with chocolate drizzle and almonds]. Joanna thanked Nate and said she can't wait to try them out. Nate added, No problem! I love to help, so just shoot me a question anytime you need! Joanna said, Got it Nate, I'll see you soon!

【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？
[November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Hope 【Nate's Gaming Setup】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate upgraded some of his equipment at home and shared an image of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard. On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna asked Nate what his favorite game was. Nate replied that he is currently playing the fantasy RPG Xeonoblade Chronicles and that it’s been a blast; he highly reccomend it if you’ve never played it before. Image shared by Nate: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people. Joanna asked what made him start playing it and whether Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series. Nate confirmed that Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series, said he is a big fan of Nintendo games, and explained that he had actually been wanting to play this one for a while because his friends have played it and reccomended it. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass. Joanna noted that it’s nice when a friend’s reccomendation fits your taste well. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum. Nate concluded that it’s true, and that he loves when Joanna gives him movie reccomendations, usually liking them more then if he were to just watch some random one.

【Tournament】On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on winning the tournament, noting that he must have been buzzing, and stated she has been working on something exciting; last Friday she finished the presentation for producers, which was tough but is looking good. She asked what Nate had been up to. Joanna shared an image: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter. 【Joanna's Screenwriting】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：08:10 PM。 Joanna 表示正在写另一部电影剧本，一部充满挑战的爱情故事，投入了大量心血，期望能在大银幕上映；她感谢 Nate，称写作一直是她的热情，且这部剧本的灵感来自一个梦，并询问 Nate 的乌龟近况，表示好久没看到它们的照片。她还说创造故事并让它们栩栩如生给她带来幸福和充实，写作一直是她的祝福；她提到实际上上周又提交了几份作品，期望很快得到回复，尽管她预计其中会有一些被拒绝。她再次感谢 Nate，表示感激鼓励并发誓不会放弃，说 Got it covered!；她还说很高兴听到这个消息！她刚完成下一部电影剧本的序章，并决定在 begining 加入这一段。 [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man] 【Nate's Encouragement】[Nate's Encouragement]
[Session Date: November 07, 2022]

On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate told Joanna: "Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. 【Turtles】On March 18, 2022 at 06:59 PM, Joanna asked why Nate chose turtles as pets after noting a photo of three turtles sitting on rocks in a pond. Joanna asked whether caring for them is tough. Nate answered that it is not, requiring only to keep their area clean, feed them properly, and ensure they get enough light, and he finds it actually fun. Joanna said having pets must be a wonderful experience. Nate stated that pets bring tons of joy, are always there, and are cute, and relaxing with them is a great way to chill. Nate apologized and suggested there might be other animals to consider; in the meantime, he would send pictures of his turtles so she can watch them grow without getting too close. Joanna replied that it's a great idea and she is already really invested in those little guys. 【Cockroaches】March 18, 2022, 06:59 PM: Joanna stated that she wishes she weren't allergic, would get two turtles today if she could, and recently learned she is allergic to cockroaches as well, so who knows if she'll ever get a pet. 【Nate】Session Date: March 18, 2022. 【Turtles】会话日期：2022-09-05。2022-09-05 18:03，Nate 表示好久不谈，发生了很多事，看它们有多可爱，和它们在一起在最近特别有帮助；他在一次电子游戏锦标赛中遭遇挫折，尽管努力但表现不佳，这是一次挫折，但他正努力保持积极；图片：两只乌龟坐在池塘边的岩石上的照片。2022-09-05 18:03，Joanna 回复：乌龟很可爱，挫折令人失望，是否有积极的运气向你靠拢？她刚重做了一份旧食谱并做了这个，图片：草莓和巧克力的蛋糕照片。2022-09-05 18:03，Nate 回应：确实不理想地没做好，但这是学习曲线的一部分；另外那看起来很棒；无论如何，你最近怎么样？

Long 【Desserts】2022年9月5日 18:03，Joanna 与 Nate 的 Desserts 会话记录如下：Joanna 表示自己还好，正在改良一个甜点配方及其他几个配方，感到安慰并获得创意。Nate 询问她还在做什么，并说在她处于这种情绪时看到她的作品总是很有满足感。Joanna 表示她正在调整一个甜点配方，使其更美味且更易做。Nate 询问她在尝试哪些口味。Joanna 表示正在尝试巧克力、覆盆子和椰子口味。Nate 询问她是否只在尝试无乳制品选项。Joanna 表示因为乳糖不耐症，她正在尝试无乳制品选项，如椰子奶或杏仁奶，并提到她做了无乳巧克力椰子杯子蛋糕，覆盆子糖霜，并分享了一张照片：一盘杯子蛋糕，表面有不同的装饰。Nate 表示看起来很棒，问她是否还有更多美味的配方。Joanna 表示她已经制作了各种适合所有人饮食的甜点——曲奇、派、蛋糕等，并将很快分享更多配方。 【Meetups】Session Date: September 05, 2022. At 06:03 PM, Nate stated, Can't wait to try them. Can I join you sometime?, and shared [Image shared by Nate: a photo of a pile of cookies with sprinkles on a wooden table]. Joanna asked for more tips for dairy-free baking. Nate replied, You can use dairy-free margarine or coconut oil instead of butter, and check the labels to ensure they're dairy-free. Good luck! [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a cookie with chocolate drizzle and almonds]. Joanna thanked Nate and said she can't wait to try them out. Nate added, No problem! I love to help, so just shoot me a question anytime you need! Joanna said, Got it Nate, I'll see you soon!

3.mflow_response: She’s lactose intolerant, so avoids dairy.

Nate said he'll add it to his list and thanked her for the recommendation. Joanna asked him to let her know what he thinks when he's done, and Nate replied that he would be the first to know.

【Joanna's Movie Premiere】On October 25, 2022, at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna what's been up since they last chatted. Joanna replied that another movie script she contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time; it was such a surreal experience, she felt a mix of emotions but overall a satisfying moment, and she had been waiting for this for a long time. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it. Nate congratulated Joanna and asked how it was to finally see it on the big screen, sharing a photo holding a videogame controller; Image shared by Nate: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it. Joanna said: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome! Nate asked: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it? Joanna answered: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it. 【Joanna's Drawings】October 25, 2022, 08:16 PM: Nate complimented Joanna on her drawings and asked what inspired her to create them. Joanna replied that they are visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in her head so she can write better. 【Joanna's Idea Origins】Joanna's Idea Origins. Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM, Nate asked, "That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?" At 08:16 PM, Joanna replied, "I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes." 【Joanna's Movie-Watching Plan】Session Date: October 25, 2022. On October 25, 2022 at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna about the character on the left in the photo. Joanna replied, "You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself." Nate stated he was already planning to watch it, and that discussing it made him want to watch it even more. 【Joanna & Nate: Personal Catch-Up】Session: Joanna & Nate — Personal Catch-Up; Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM on October 25, 2022, Joanna said: "Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?"

【Tournament】On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on winning the tournament, noting that he must have been buzzing, and stated she has been working on something exciting; last Friday she finished the presentation for producers, which was tough but is looking good. She asked what Nate had been up to. Joanna shared an image: a photo of a notebook with a handwritten letter. 【Joanna's Screenwriting】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：08:10 PM。 Joanna 表示正在写另一部电影剧本，一部充满挑战的爱情故事，投入了大量心血，期望能在大银幕上映；她感谢 Nate，称写作一直是她的热情，且这部剧本的灵感来自一个梦，并询问 Nate 的乌龟近况，表示好久没看到它们的照片。她还说创造故事并让它们栩栩如生给她带来幸福和充实，写作一直是她的祝福；她提到实际上上周又提交了几份作品，期望很快得到回复，尽管她预计其中会有一些被拒绝。她再次感谢 Nate，表示感激鼓励并发誓不会放弃，说 Got it covered!；她还说很高兴听到这个消息！她刚完成下一部电影剧本的序章，并决定在 begining 加入这一段。 [Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a young man] 【Nate's Encouragement】[Nate's Encouragement]
[Session Date: November 07, 2022]

On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate told Joanna: "Woah Joanna, that's incredible! I remember when you started working on these sorta things. It's crazy to see how far you've gotten! You've really got a thing for writing, huh? Where'd you get the idea for it?" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. He added: "Well with dedication like yours, its no wonder you do so well in it as well! Are you planning on submitting anymore scripts anytime soon?" He concluded: "Even if it happens to a few, I'm sure at leasts one will make it to the screens and be your 3rd published movie!"

【Nate and Joanna: Hobbies】On January 21, 2022 at 07:31 PM, Nate asked, "It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?" Joanna replied, "Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?" Nate said, "Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies." 【Nate and Joanna: Movie Genres】On January 21, 2022, 07:31 PM, Joanna said that Nate and she have similar interests and asked what type of movies he likes best; Nate replied that he loves action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool, and asked what Joanna's favorite genre is; Joanna said she is all about dramas and romcoms and loves getting immersed in the feelings and plots.

3.mflow_response: He recently saw the movie Inception.
