memories.memory: 【Nate's Gaming Outlook】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Nate reports that his game tournament was pushed back, he tried cooking, and shared a photo of homemade coconut ice cream with sprinkles that changed the color. Joanna comments that it looks yummy, she can’t try it right now, and asks how the last game tournament went. Nate says the tournament was tough and he didn’t make the finals; but that’s okay, he’ll get ’em next time. Joanna notes that it’s a bummer, but staying positive, and asks what his next move in gaming is. Nate says he’s thinking of joining a new gaming team after this next tourney, he’s had a few offers but hasn’t decided yet; it’s gonna be a big step, but he’s ready for a shake up. Joanna says making a switch could open up new opportunities and wishes him luck with picking the right team. Nate thanks her, says it’s a big decision but he’s excited for what the future holds, and asks what’s happening on her end.

【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？
[November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Hope 【Nate's Gaming Setup】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate upgraded some of his equipment at home and shared an image of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard. Joanna asked whether he uses that computer for gaming. Nate replied, yes, this is where he practices and competes, and he sometimes uses it when playing games with friends. Joanna noted that having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help him stay focused. Nate stated that he loves it and that it's like his own little haven to escape into the virtual world, and shared an image of a desk with two monitors and a laptop. Joanna said it sounds great to have his own gaming setup at home; it must be awesome. Nate concluded that it really is and that it's also really important for his career, otherwise he would never be able to beat his competition, and shared an image of a pair of headphones and a video game controller. 【Xeonoblade Chronicles & Nintendo】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna asked Nate what his favorite game was. Nate replied that he is currently playing the fantasy RPG Xeonoblade Chronicles and that it’s been a blast; he highly reccomend it if you’ve never played it before. Image shared by Nate: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people. Joanna asked what made him start playing it and whether Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series. Nate confirmed that Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series, said he is a big fan of Nintendo games, and explained that he had actually been wanting to play this one for a while because his friends have played it and reccomended it. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass. Joanna noted that it’s nice when a friend’s reccomendation fits your taste well. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum. Nate concluded that it’s true, and that he loves when Joanna gives him movie reccomendations, usually liking them more then if he were to just watch some random one.

【Board Game Convention】Board Game Convention; Session Date: October 09, 2022. 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Nate: 上周五参加了一个游戏大会，遇到非他常规圈子的人，感到有点不知所措，但这让他想起了游戏带来的美好时光；随文附有图片：Nate 分享的图片为一名男子站在摆满桌游的桌子前。 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Joanna: 回复称听起来很有趣，认识新朋友或许会让人不知所措，但回报也很大，走出舒适区探索新事物有时有益。 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Nate: 表示若敢冒险就能获得美好体验，他在大会上还结识了同样热爱游戏的朋友，已经计划一起进行一次游戏会，遇到有相同兴趣的人很酷；随文附有图片：两个人穿着戏装合影。 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Joanna: 看起来很棒，遇到志同道合的人确实会让体验更有趣。 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Nate: 还遇到了一些也玩他所钟爱的这款桌游的人，于是加入他们。大家有很多共同点，气氛融洽，共享爱好确实能让人们建立联系；随文附有图片：一群人坐在桌旁围坐玩桌游。 2022-10-09 10:58 AM, Joanna: 这真是令人难以置信，游戏能把人聚在一起并建立强关系；Did you do anything else there? 【Catan Gameplay and Competition】Session Date: October 09, 2022. At 10:58 AM, Nate stated that they played Catan, a great strategy game where you build settlements and trade resources, and he loves it; he shared an image of a board with a blue board and a yellow board. Joanna asked if it is more of a competitive game or a chill one. Nate replied that it can be both; they were competing but had lots of fun. Joanna observed that competitive games can be difficult when people get upset about every move, but the group was chill, and she was glad they had a good time. Nate added that playing games is his escape from life struggles, so he generally doesn't get crazy competitive over them, and the people at the convention were the same way. 【Writing Conventions】On October 09, 2022, at 10:58 AM, Nate suggested that they should go to a writing convention sometime and stated that the experience at this convention is unforgetable. Joanna asked whether writing conventions exist, said she would have to look into that, noted it could be fun, thanked Nate for the idea, and asked whether he had been up to anything tonight.

【Joanna Stage Experience】[Joanna Stage Experience]
[Session Date: April 21, 2022]

On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Joanna stated that nerves and excitement on stage are a rush; she recalled her first play, when she was so nervous she forgot her lines, which was embarrassing but taught the importance of preparation and staying in the moment. An image shared by Joanna shows a man in a striped suit performing on stage. At 07:44 PM, Nate replied that it sounds like you had an interesting time on stage and that it's always a learning experience, and asked whether you have considered going back to acting and whether that is you in the photo. 【Joanna's Creative Path】Session Date: April 21, 2022. At 07:44 PM, Joanna states that acting was her first passion, but she now shines in writing, which expresses her in a new way, and she may return to acting someday—never say never. At 07:44 PM, Nate says: Go for it; follow your passion for writing, but if acting truly makes you happy, give it a shot as well; who knows what'll happen. Nate shares an image: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. At 07:44 PM, Joanna says she will keep writing, but if acting calls out she might give it a try; she really enjoys dramas and emotionally-driven films, and she asks what inspires Nate's passion. 【Nate's Entertainment Choices】On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Nate stated that he loves fantasy and sci-fi movies, they are a great escape and get his imagination going, and that playing video games is a great way to express his creativity and passion. Image shared by Nate: a photography of a black xbox controller sitting on top of a wooden table.

【The Lord of the Rings】Session Date: May 02, 2022. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Joanna said, "Hey Nate, how's it going? I took your reccomendation and watched "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy last night! It was awesome!" Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a book openhemer. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Nate replied, "Glad to hear you enjoyed it! It's probably the greatest trilogy of all time! As for me, life's been ok, just taking care of this." Image shared by Nate: a photo of a gaming room with a computer and a gaming chair. 【Street Fighter Tournament】Session Date: May 02, 2022. On May 02, 2022 at 11:54 AM, Joanna praised Nate's progress and noted that his gaming room looked great, asking whether he had been gaming a lot recently. Nate stated that gaming had been his focus, with extensive practice and winning a few tournaments; last week he won his second tournament. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman with purple hair and a black dress. Joanna asked what game he was playing. Nate replied that he usually plays CS:GO, but tried his hand at the local Street Fighter tournament this time since he plays that game a lot with his friends, and turns out he's really good. Joanna asked how it felt to win. Nate said it was super awesome, with a lot of adrenaline in the last match, and the other finalist even shook my hand.

【Counter-Strike: Global Offensive】On January 21, 2022, at 07:31 PM, Nate stated that he won his first video game tournament last week, and that it was in a team shooter game. Joanna asked what game it was. Nate stated that the game was Counter-Strike: Global Offensive, and that he and his team had a blast to the very end. Joanna commented that it sounded like a fun experience, even if she isn’t into games.

【Nate's Gaming Week】On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Nate told Joanna that his game tournament was pushed back, leading him to try cooking; he shared a photo of homemade coconut ice cream with sprinkles that changed the color, showing a person scooping ice cream into a pan. Joanna replied that it looked yummy, she can’t try it right now, and asked how the last game tournament went. Nate responded that the tournament was tough and he didn’t make the finals but he’ll get them next time. Joanna encouraged staying positive and asked about his next move in gaming. Nate said he plans to join a new gaming team after the next tourney, has had a few offers but hasn’t decided yet; it’s a big step and he’s ready for a shake up. Joanna said making a switch could open up new opportunities and wished him luck with picking the right team. Nate concluded that it’s a big decision, but he’s excited for the future and asked how Joanna is doing and if anything exciting is happening on her end.

【Nate's YouTube gaming idea】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate stated that creating gaming content for YouTube is a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy his video game cravings when there aren’t any tournaments going on; image shared by Nate shows a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone. Joanna asked what inspired Nate to start making gaming videos. Nate replied that he is a big fan of gaming videos and thought it would be fun to start making them himself, hoping to share his love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too. 【Joanna's guidance】On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna acknowledged Nate's activity in making videos and connecting with people about gaming. Nate said it's new to him but he's excited to get started. Joanna advised him to watch other peoples videos first to understand what his audience likes, so his videos do not flop when posted. Nate stated that he is already doing that.

【YouTube Gaming Content】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Nate stated that he is creating gaming content for YouTube, a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy his video game cravings when there aren't any tourneys going on; an image shared by Nate shows a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone. Joanna asked what inspired Nate to start making gaming videos. Nate replied that he is a big fan of gaming and thought it would be a fun idea to start making them himself, hoping to share his love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too. Joanna commented that Nate will do great, noting that making videos and connecting with people about gaming is awesome. Nate concluded that it's new to him but he's excited to get started. 【YouTube Audience Feedback】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM on November 09, 2022, Joanna stated: "Make sure you watch other peoples videos first so you get a handle on what your audience likes! That way your videos don't flop when you post them." An image shared by Joanna shows a photo of a computer screen displaying a product listing. At 05:54 PM on November 09, 2022, Nate stated: "Already doing that, but thanks for the advice!" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a computer screen with a message on it.

【Inception】[Inception]
[Session Date: October 09, 2022]

在 October 09, 2022, 10:58 AM，Nate 表示他大多在家放松，玩电子游戏或看电影有助于他放松；Nate 发送的图片是一张书架摆满 dvds 和电影的照片。Joanna 回应：听起来很棒！你最近看过的最喜欢的游戏或电影是什么？Nate 回答：我最近看了一部充满扭曲情节和梦境元素的电影，我记得它好像叫做“Inception”；我也一直在不停地玩一款拥有伟大未来感设定和玩法的游戏，叫做“Cyberpunk 2077”；你最近有没有看过或玩过什么好玩的？Joanna 回应：我前几天看了一部经典电影，太棒了——故事扣人心弦，演员也很出色，真的给我留下了深刻印象；[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带签名照片的装裱电影海报] Nate 问道：哇，那一定很棒！你会给它打几分？Joanna 回答：嗯，真的很棒，可能是9或10分（满分为10分）！电影能带我们去不同的地方，让我们感受大量情感。你爱看电影的原因是什么？Nate 回答：它们把我带到新的世界，充满情感；而且在一天结束后，它们也很适合放松。Joanna 同意：它们有把我们带离现实、让我们体验日常生活中不常感受的情感的力量，这是一个很棒的逃离，尤其是当你有这样的房间时！[由 Joanna 分享的图片：一张带电视和蜡烛的客厅照片] 【Living Room Setup】On October 09, 2022, at 10:58 AM, Nate stated that the living room is very comfy and that he should get a setup like that. Joanna replied that it is better to watch a movie in a theater, but on a nice comfy couch with a good blanket, she feels so at peace. Nate asked for pointers on what to get to make his living room as comfy as that. Joanna advised: get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure it’s really fluffy; also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. She also shared an image: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench. Nate acknowledged that Joanna had really gotten into making her living room and said he’ll try those suggestions. Joanna added that she gets super invested in random little things like that, but it’s all worth it when she ends up with random little things that make life so much nicer. Nate thanked her for the tip.

3.mflow_response: He's been playing Cyberpunk 2077 nonstop.

memories.memory:
【Turtles】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Joanna asked Nate what made him get a third turtle. Nate responded that turtles bring him joy and peace and have such an effect on us; they are best buddies ever. He said he saw another at a pet store and had to get him; the tank is big enough now for three, so he figured why not. An image shared by Nate shows a turtle swimming in a tank with a metal bar. Nate stated he was very happy with the decision and wouldn't have it any other way. He added that he would give the turtles a bath before you get here so they're ready to play. 【Joanna's Visit】On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna asked if she could come over sometime to watch him play with them from a distance, since she is allergic. Nate replied, Definitely! He would love to have her over again, and suggested watching one of her movies together or going to the park. Joanna replied, For sure, she’d love to do either of those things with him. 【Nate's Reflections】Session Date: November 09, 2022

On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate described nature's reminder to appreciate the beauty around us, stated that moments like those stay with you, and noted that these critters also make him appreciate life's little joys, adding that he has a new friend for them; an image shared by Nate shows three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond. On the same date and time, Joanna remarked that life is unpredictable and that just last week Nate would not have expected to be getting a third turtle this year. On the same date and time, Nate bid Joanna goodbye.

【Peaceful Moments】On April 17, 2022 at 06:44 PM, Nate expressed agreement ('Me too!') and said he loves watching them play to enjoy the peaceful moments of life, and that he sometimes brings them into the kitchen so they can watch him make food like this; an image shared by Nate shows a bowl of ice cream and a bowl of sprinkles. 【Dairy-Free Ice Cream Recipe】Session Date: April 17, 2022. On April 17, 2022, at 06:44 PM, Joanna expresses love for the ice cream and wishes to make it the way Nate does. Nate replies that it is dairy-free and easy and offers the recipe. Joanna, lactose intolerant, requests the dairy-free recipe. Nate provides the recipe: coconut milk, vanilla extract, sugar, and a pinch of salt; after chilling in the fridge, the mixture is placed in the ice cream maker and frozen until scoopable. Joanna says the result sounds delicious and plans to try it tonight, thanking Nate for sharing. Nate says he is glad to help and asks to be informed of the outcome. Joanna confirms she will let Nate know how it turns out and thanks for sharing the recipe.

【Cork Board Keepsakes】Session Date: June 05, 2022. At 02:12 PM, Nate asked Joanna to show him a picture of her cork board. Joanna provided a picture of her cork board, which contains quotes, photos, and little keepsakes; Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a picture frame with a picture of a family. Nate responded that it is a great picture of the family and asked what made her hang it on the cork board. Joanna explained that having that picture on the cork board reminds her of the love and encouragement from them every day. Nate stated that family support is invaluable and that it’s good to have those reminders. Joanna concluded that it means a lot and keeps her going.

【Weekend_Relaxation】Session Date: August 22, 2022.

On August 22, 2022 at 10:57 AM, Nate stated that he is taking some time off this weekend to chill with his pets and asked if anything cool is happening with Joanna. Joanna stated that she is relaxing and recharging this weekend with a long walk and some reading, and that it is a good break. Nate stated that it looks like they both need a break, that he is glad she is able to recharge, and that it is incredibly important to take time off. Joanna stated that she has learned that taking breaks and looking after herself are important for her inspiration and mental health, and that it's all about finding balance.

Nate asked for pointers on what to get to make his living room as comfy as that. Joanna advised: get a couch that can sit multiple people so that you can lay down if you want, and make sure it’s really fluffy; also invest in a blanket that has a little bit of weight to it, and some lights that can be dimmed. She also shared an image: a photo of a poster of a man and a woman sitting on a bench. Nate acknowledged that Joanna had really gotten into making her living room and said he’ll try those suggestions. Joanna added that she gets super invested in random little things like that, but it’s all worth it when she ends up with random little things that make life so much nicer. Nate thanked her for the tip.

【Nate's Hair Dye】Session Date: April 15, 2022. At 07:37 PM on April 15, 2022, Nate said he dyed his hair last week and shared an image: a man with purple hair and glasses taking a selfie. Joanna replied that Nate's new hair color looks amazing, couldn't wait to see it, and asked what made him choose that shade. Nate said he was stoked, asked her to check it out, and thanked her. He stated he picked this color because it's bright and bold—like him—and he wanted to stand out from the regular options. 【Sunset & Vacations】Session Date: April 15, 2022.

On April 15, 2022, at 07:37 PM, Joanna described a gorgeous sunset she saw while hiking the other day and shared an image showing a street with a stop sign and a cloudy sky. Nate said the sunset looked awesome and asked whether there are more exciting trips coming up. Joanna stated that the sky was gorgeous, that she did have a vacation lined up but right now her writing is consuming her, and she was hoping for some good news soon. Nate acknowledged that big projects can be taxing and asked to keep him posted. Joanna concluded that Nate's support means a lot and she would definitely keep him updated. 【Bye Nate】Session Date: April 15, 2022; at 07:37 PM, Nate stated "Sounds great, See you soon?"; Joanna responded "Totally".

【Self-care】On August 22, 2022, at 10:57 AM, Nate stated that balance is key and that taking care of ourselves helps us be more creative and happier. He is always looking for something new to read and asked for book recommendations, noting he has a lot of books to choose from. An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a bookcase filled with books and a toy car. 【Fantasy Series】On August 22, 2022, at 10:57 AM, in a Fantasy Series discussion, Joanna recommended finding a fantasy book series to read through, noting most fiction series are great reads when you're trying to relax. Nate replied, Good idea! How about this series? and shared an image of a stack of books sitting on top of a wooden table. Joanna said, That's a great one! Let me know what you think when your finished! Nate responded, Sure thing! And since your recommending me a book, I thought I should do the same! I'd really recommend this series. It's got awesome battles and interesting characters. and shared an image of a poster of a man falling off a cliff. Joanna said, Wow, that series looks awesome! I'll have to check it out sometime! Nate added, You really should! The action scenes are awesome and the plot rocks. Definitely one of my favorites! Joanna concluded, Wow, sounds great! I'll definitely add it to my list; thanks for the recommendation! 【Closing Remarks】Session Date: August 22, 2022; at 10:57 AM, Nate posted a closing remark and Joanna posted closing remarks.

【Nate's Achievements】Session Date: August 22, 2022. At 10:57 AM on August 22, 2022, Nate stated that he was stoked to see all his hard work paying off and proud of what he accomplished. He noted that his little dudes got a new tank. An image shared by Nate shows a fish tank with a fish inside. 【Nate's Companions】Session Date: August 22, 2022. At 10:57 AM, Joanna observed that Nate's companions are adorable and have more room to swim now due to the tank expansion. Nate stated that they are his little buddies, always calm and peaceful, and that the tank expansion has made them so happy, which makes coming home after a long day of gaming better.

【Fort Wayne Sunset Photo】November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Joanna shared an image—a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background. November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Nate commented that the sunset pic looked incredible and asked what inspired the photo. November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Joanna replied that she took the pic on a hike last summer near Fort Wayne; the sunset and the surrounding beauty were incredible, a reminder of nature's beauty. November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Nate stated that nature reminds us to appreciate the beauty around us and moments like those stay with you, and that these critters also make him appreciate life's little joys, and that he got them a new friend. Nate said turtles bring him joy and peace; he saw another at a pet store and had to get him; the tank is big enough now for three, so he figured why not. An image shared by Nate shows a turtle swimming in a tank with a metal bar. Joanna remarked that life can take unexpected turns and that she would not have predicted he would be getting a third turtle this year. Nate agreed he is happy with the decision and wouldn't have it any other way. Joanna asked to visit and watch the turtles from a distance due to her allergy. Nate replied that he would love to have her over again, suggesting watching one of her movies together or going to the park. Joanna said she would love to do either. Nate said he would bathe the turtles before she gets here so they're ready to play. Joanna said see you tomorrow. Nate said goodbye.

【Nate and Joanna】April 17, 2022, 06:44 PM: Nate noted they hadn't talked in a while and asked how it was going. Nate added that he probably has loads of books he hasn't read in years, calling it a blast from the past.

【Joanna's Movie Premiere】On October 25, 2022, at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna what's been up since they last chatted. Joanna replied that another movie script she contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time; it was such a surreal experience, she felt a mix of emotions but overall a satisfying moment, and she had been waiting for this for a long time. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it. Nate congratulated Joanna and asked how it was to finally see it on the big screen, sharing a photo holding a videogame controller; Image shared by Nate: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it. Joanna said: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome! Nate asked: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it? Joanna answered: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it. 【Joanna's Drawings】October 25, 2022, 08:16 PM: Nate complimented Joanna on her drawings and asked what inspired her to create them. Joanna replied that they are visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in her head so she can write better. 【Joanna's Idea Origins】Joanna's Idea Origins. Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM, Nate asked, "That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?" At 08:16 PM, Joanna replied, "I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes." 【Joanna's Movie-Watching Plan】Session Date: October 25, 2022. On October 25, 2022 at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna about the character on the left in the photo. Joanna replied, "You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself." Nate stated he was already planning to watch it, and that discussing it made him want to watch it even more. 【Joanna & Nate: Personal Catch-Up】Session: Joanna & Nate — Personal Catch-Up; Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM on October 25, 2022, Joanna said: "Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?"

【Little Women】On February 07, 2022, at 09:27 AM, Joanna said she had just watched "Little Women" and that it was amazing, describing it as a great story about sisterhood, love, and reaching for your dreams; it is definitely a must-see. Nate replied that he had not watched any good movies recently and asked for recommendations. Joanna said she is always down to give movie reccomendations. Nate said he'll add it to his list and thanked her for the recommendation. Joanna asked him to let her know what he thinks when he's done, and Nate replied that he would be the first to know.

【Little Women】On October 06, 2022, at 11:15 AM, Joanna stated, "Taking breaks and reducing stress is pretty nice!" and asked, "Have you watched any good movies recently? I could use some recommendations!" At the same timestamp, Nate responded, "I watched 'Little Women' recently, and it was great! The acting was awesome and the story was so captivating. Definitely a good one!"

【Joanna's Road-Trip Film】Joanna's Road-Trip Film. Session Date: November 11, 2022. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna states she is finally filming her own movie from the road-trip script. An image shared by Joanna shows a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed. At 12:06 AM on November 11, 2022, Nate congratulates Joanna, noting that her hard work paid off and that it must feel awesome to see her script come alive in a movie, and he asks for more details about the movie. An image shared by Nate shows a trophy and a game controller on a table. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna replies that it is pretty wild to see it come alive, that every day on set is awesome and full of potential, and that being able to show her vision is awesome. 【Joanna's Coolest Moment on Set】On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Nate said, "I think so too! What's been the coolest moment on set?" and shared an image of a fish tank with a fish inside. Joanna said that one of the actors came up to her and told her how much she liked her script, and she was excited, noting that it gave her chills.

【Nate and Joanna: Hobbies】On January 21, 2022 at 07:31 PM, Nate asked, "It was! How about you? Do you have any hobbies you love?" Joanna replied, "Yeah! Besides writing, I also enjoy reading, watching movies, and exploring nature. Anything else you enjoy doing, Nate?" Nate said, "Playing video games and watching movies are my main hobbies." 【Nate and Joanna: Movie Genres】On January 21, 2022, 07:31 PM, Joanna said that Nate and she have similar interests and asked what type of movies he likes best; Nate replied that he loves action and sci-fi movies, the effects are so cool, and asked what Joanna's favorite genre is; Joanna said she is all about dramas and romcoms and loves getting immersed in the feelings and plots.

【Joanna's Screenplay】On February 25, 2022, at 01:07 PM, Joanna told Nate that she can’t stop thinking about the screenplay and started writing another one while waiting to hear back about how the first did, and she complimented his cooking. Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Nate closed by saying Crossing my fingers for you, hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due, good luck!

memories.memory: 【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna's Writing】On August 14, 2022, at 06:12 PM, Joanna stated she has been busy with writing projects and going all out; writing is a huge part of her now, with her journal as her rock, and it has been the best thing ever, a mix of highs and lows. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it. She added that writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, giving her a chance to put all her thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it; words have a magical way of healing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper. Last week, someone wrote her a letter after reading an online blog post she made about a hard moment in her life; their words touched her, they said her story had brought them comfort, and it was awesome to realize her words had that kind of power, reminding her why she loves writing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper. She expressed appreciation for Nate's kind words, saying that knowing her writing can make a difference keeps her going even on tough days, and that this outlet to share her stories and hopefully have an impact is valuable. 【Nate's Support】Session Date: August 14, 2022, 06:12 PM. Nate stated to Joanna that writing can be a path to solace and creativity and that an activity can become a part of our lives, and that she is inspiring; he asked whether writing is her route to solace and creativity. He added that it's really cool and that words can turn something sad into something special, expressed that it worked for her, and asked if anything cool has happened recently. He concluded that Joanna's work is nice, that it must feel sureal, and that she is changing lives.

【Joanna and Nate: Supportive Journey】On May 25, 2022 at 03:00 PM, Joanna said that thinking back to the tough times finishing her screenplay made her realize it's those moments that bring joy and make the journey worth it. Joanna added that appreciating the journey and being aware of those happy moments can be a game-changer, keeping them focused on their dreams, and she can't wait to show it to him, valuing his opinion. Nate said he can't wait to see it and that he's here to support her. Joanna expressed appreciation for Nate's support and said she'll keep him updated. Nate encouraged her: No worries! You've got this. Keep it up.

Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Nate closed by saying Crossing my fingers for you, hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due, good luck!

Joanna replied that another movie script she contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time; it was such a surreal experience, she felt a mix of emotions but overall a satisfying moment, and she had been waiting for this for a long time. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it. Nate congratulated Joanna and asked how it was to finally see it on the big screen, sharing a photo holding a videogame controller; Image shared by Nate: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it. Joanna said: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome! Nate asked: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it? Joanna answered: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it. 【Joanna's Drawings】October 25, 2022, 08:16 PM: Nate complimented Joanna on her drawings and asked what inspired her to create them. Joanna replied that they are visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in her head so she can write better. 【Joanna's Idea Origins】Joanna's Idea Origins. Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM, Nate asked, "That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?" At 08:16 PM, Joanna replied, "I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes." 【Joanna's Movie-Watching Plan】Session Date: October 25, 2022. On October 25, 2022 at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna about the character on the left in the photo. Joanna replied, "You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself." Nate stated he was already planning to watch it, and that discussing it made him want to watch it even more. 【Joanna & Nate: Personal Catch-Up】Session: Joanna & Nate — Personal Catch-Up; Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM on October 25, 2022, Joanna said: "Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?"

【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna's Writing】On August 14, 2022, at 06:12 PM, Joanna stated she has been busy with writing projects and going all out; writing is a huge part of her now, with her journal as her rock, and it has been the best thing ever, a mix of highs and lows. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it. She added that writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, giving her a chance to put all her thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it; words have a magical way of healing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper. Last week, someone wrote her a letter after reading an online blog post she made about a hard moment in her life; their words touched her, they said her story had brought them comfort, and it was awesome to realize her words had that kind of power, reminding her why she loves writing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper. She expressed appreciation for Nate's kind words, saying that knowing her writing can make a difference keeps her going even on tough days, and that this outlet to share her stories and hopefully have an impact is valuable. 【Nate's Support】Session Date: August 14, 2022, 06:12 PM. Nate stated to Joanna that writing can be a path to solace and creativity and that an activity can become a part of our lives, and that she is inspiring; he asked whether writing is her route to solace and creativity. He added that it's really cool and that words can turn something sad into something special, expressed that it worked for her, and asked if anything cool has happened recently. He concluded that Joanna's work is nice, that it must feel sureal, and that she is changing lives.

【Joanna Stage Experience】[Joanna Stage Experience]
[Session Date: April 21, 2022]

On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Joanna stated that nerves and excitement on stage are a rush; she recalled her first play, when she was so nervous she forgot her lines, which was embarrassing but taught the importance of preparation and staying in the moment. An image shared by Joanna shows a man in a striped suit performing on stage. At 07:44 PM, Nate replied that it sounds like you had an interesting time on stage and that it's always a learning experience, and asked whether you have considered going back to acting and whether that is you in the photo. 【Joanna's Creative Path】Session Date: April 21, 2022. At 07:44 PM, Joanna states that acting was her first passion, but she now shines in writing, which expresses her in a new way, and she may return to acting someday—never say never. At 07:44 PM, Nate says: Go for it; follow your passion for writing, but if acting truly makes you happy, give it a shot as well; who knows what'll happen. Nate shares an image: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. At 07:44 PM, Joanna says she will keep writing, but if acting calls out she might give it a try; she really enjoys dramas and emotionally-driven films, and she asks what inspires Nate's passion. 【Nate's Entertainment Choices】On April 21, 2022 at 07:44 PM, Nate stated that he loves fantasy and sci-fi movies, they are a great escape and get his imagination going, and that playing video games is a great way to express his creativity and passion. Image shared by Nate: a photography of a black xbox controller sitting on top of a wooden table.

【Producer Meetings】On November 04, 2022, at 03:56 PM, Joanna said she had set up meetings with movie producers, and Nate asked how it went with those producer meetings. Joanna reported the meetings went really well; she was confident discussing her script and vision; the producers seemed interested and excited; they loved the elements of self-discovery in it; it was validating to be taken seriously; she felt hopeful and inspired about the future. Nate praised Joanna, saying putting herself out there is brave and that winning recognition for hard work feels great; he compared it to winning a video game tournament, and expressed pride that she felt hopeful and inspired. He shared an image: a photo of a television screen showing a game being played. Joanna thanked Nate; her support and encouragement mean a lot; writing isn't always easy but moments like these make me appreciate it; last week, she found these old notebooks with her early writings - it was cool to see how far she's come. She shared an image: a photo of a notebook with a list of things to write. Hey Nate! Apart from meetings, I'm working on a project - challenging but fulfilling. How about you? What's been going on? Joanna added: I couldn't agree more! Which is why my meetings are so exciting! 【Turtle Story】Session Date: November 04, 2022. At 03:56 PM, Nate asked whether there is a favorite piece from Joanna's early writings that stands out and attached an image: Image shared by Nate: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. Joanna replied that she still remembers this story from when she was 10, about a brave little turtle who was scared but explored the world anyway, and that she was inspired by stories about finding courage and taking risks; this theme remains part of her writing today. At 03:56 PM, Nate remarked on Joanna's passion for writing, noted the turtle theme, and said the turtle's resilience is inspiring, urging her to take courage and keep pushing with her writing; he attached the same image again: Image shared by Nate: a photo of a turtle laying on a bed of rocks and gravel. Joanna responded that the turtles make her think of strength and perseverance, that they motivate her in tough times, and that she is glad Nate finds that inspiring. At 03:56 PM, Nate said that he loves turtles and asked what has been happening with Joanna.

【Joanna's Road-Trip Film】Joanna's Road-Trip Film. Session Date: November 11, 2022. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna states she is finally filming her own movie from the road-trip script. An image shared by Joanna shows a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed. At 12:06 AM on November 11, 2022, Nate congratulates Joanna, noting that her hard work paid off and that it must feel awesome to see her script come alive in a movie, and he asks for more details about the movie. An image shared by Nate shows a trophy and a game controller on a table. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna replies that it is pretty wild to see it come alive, that every day on set is awesome and full of potential, and that being able to show her vision is awesome. 【Joanna's Coolest Moment on Set】On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Nate said, "I think so too! What's been the coolest moment on set?" and shared an image of a fish tank with a fish inside. Joanna said that one of the actors came up to her and told her how much she liked her script, and she was excited, noting that it gave her chills.

【Woodhaven】On July 10, 2022, at 02:34 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on his success, stated that his hard work had paid off and encouraged him to keep it up, and noted that she had taken a road trip for research for her next movie as a much-needed break to explore new places and gain inspiration. Nate responded that her support meant a lot, expressed interest in her road trip, and asked where she went and whether she discovered any interesting places. Joanna then said she went to Woodhaven, a small town in the Midwest, where she enjoyed lovely scenery and historic buildings and visited the library, which had a cool old book collection, with an image showing a bookshelf filled with many books. Nate asked if she found any cool books there. Joanna replied that she stumbled upon a book from the 1900s with stories and sketches about the town and its people, with an image showing the book and a writing on it and a pen. Nate asked what stood out about it. Joanna stated that Woodhaven has had an interesting past with lots of cool people, and seeing how much it changed sparked ideas for her next script. Nate concluded that real-life stories are the best for inspiration, said he cannot wait to hear about her next one, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna】On July 10, 2022, at 02:34 PM, Joanna and Nate discussed a new screenplay: Joanna said the screenplay is different from her previous work but has the potential to be awesome and she will keep Nate posted; Nate responded that it should do as well as her last one and encouraged her to keep trying and believe in herself; Joanna said Nate's encouragement means a lot and that he is the best for supporting her writing journey; Nate said he is always here for her and that she has a lot of talent and should keep going. Joanna stated she started on a book recently since her movie did well, and there is an image: Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a handwritten page; that page contains dialogues exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness; the story is deep and emotional and she is really excited about it. Nate said it sounds awesome and he is excited to see how it all plays out. Joanna said she has never published a book before but this might be the first. Nate said good luck on that and that people will recognise you as the same author of the movie you got published and love the book even more. Joanna said thanks; belief in me means a lot; I'll keep doing my best; thanks for the support. Nate said no problem; he's here for you; your hard work will pay off; believe in yourself and your talent – you're incredible. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a person holding a small turtle in a container.

【Joanna Script Pitch】会话日期：2022年11月9日，17:54。Joanna 表示她在另一部剧本上付出大量努力，最终制定了让它拍成电影的计划；过程虽繁重但令人满意；她昨天把剧本推介给一些制片人，他们很喜欢，给她带来巨大信心提升。Nate 回应道：祝贺你有机会向剧本推介——非常令人印象深刻，感到骄傲；他还分享了一张图片，显示桌子上的奖杯和一个游戏手柄。Joanna 表示感谢，称 Nate 的支持和鼓励对她意义重大；她觉得自己现在几乎停不下来地写作，并附上了一张照片，显示桌子上放着笔和笔记本以及一本书。Nate 回应：随时。你在那本笔记本里写的是什么？有什么酷的东西吗？
[November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM] Joanna: Yup! I worked 【Joanna's Midwest Thriller】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna stated that she is working on a new project, a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town, which has been a great creative outlet for her, and she asked Nate whether he has any projects he is working on.

【Joanna's Screenplay】On February 25, 2022, at 01:07 PM, Joanna told Nate that she can’t stop thinking about the screenplay and started writing another one while waiting to hear back about how the first did, and she complimented his cooking. Nate replied that taking one's mind off something like that is very challenging and asked what the new one is about. Joanna stated the new screenplay is about a thirty year old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, somewhat similar to the last one, and that that kind of story is what inspires her. Nate described it as a deep topic and expressed interest in hearing more. Joanna said it’s her own story; the main character is dealing with loss and trying to figure out who they are, and takes a road trip to heal and grow. Nate said wow, that sounds awesome, loves stories that tackle important issues, and asked what inspired this one. Joanna answered that it was inspired by personal experiences and her own journey of self-discovery. Nate said that takes guts, he can’t wait to see it all come together, and he’s pumped to see how her first one will do. Joanna thanked him for his support, said she hopes the screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen, Fingers crossed! Nate closed by saying Crossing my fingers for you, hope your screenplay finds a fan and is given its due, good luck!

【Childhood】Session Date: November 07, 2022. At 08:10 PM, Nate stated that the letter is really awesome and asked whether it reminded Joanna of her childhood; Joanna confirmed that it did, noting that her brother wrote it and used to make her cute notes when they were kids, which brings back sweet memories. Nate commented that childhood memories can be powerful. Joanna agreed, saying they take us back to simpler times but it's nice to create new memories as we grow up. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of two little girls in pink dresses standing in front of a castle. 【Memories】November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM: Nate took his pets to the park; the pets were amazed, their happy faces made the day memorable; he treasures every memory and believes mixing the new with the old is priceless. Joanna started writing some of her favorite memories down; image shared by Joanna shows a person holding a notebook with a list of things on it. Nate said he should start doing that as well, or at least write down the things his animals like a lot. Joanna encouraged it, stating that looking back on fond memories is a blessing. Nate will start writing down some of his favorite memories with Joanna from now on. Joanna said, definitely let's keep making great memories and supporting each other, keep reaching for our dreams and make them happen; image shared by Joanna shows two women sitting on a bed laughing.

3.mflow_response: To visualize characters and write better

3.question: Where does Joanna get her ideas for the characters from?
3.gold_answer: people she knows, things she saw, her imagination

【Joanna Script Pitch】会话日期：2022年11月9日，17:54。Joanna 表示她在另一部剧本上付出大量努力，最终制定了让它拍成电影的计划；过程虽繁重但令人满意；她昨天把剧本推介给一些制片人，他们很喜欢，给她带来巨大信心提升。Nate 回应道：祝贺你有机会向剧本推介——非常令人印象深刻，感到骄傲；他还分享了一张图片，显示桌子上的奖杯和一个游戏手柄。Joanna 表示感谢，称 Nate 的支持和鼓励对她意义重大；她觉得自己现在几乎停不下来地写作，并附上了一张照片，显示桌子上放着笔和笔记本以及一本书。Nate 回应：随时。你在那本笔记本里写的是什么？有什么酷的东西吗？
[November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM] Joanna: Yup! I worked 【Joanna's Midwest Thriller】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna stated that she is working on a new project, a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town, which has been a great creative outlet for her, and she asked Nate whether he has any projects he is working on.

【Joanna's Writing】On August 14, 2022, at 06:12 PM, Joanna stated she has been busy with writing projects and going all out; writing is a huge part of her now, with her journal as her rock, and it has been the best thing ever, a mix of highs and lows. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a notebook with a bunch of stickers on it. She added that writing has become an escape and a way to express her feelings, giving her a chance to put all her thoughts and feelings down and make something good out of it; words have a magical way of healing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a handwritten letter from a man who is holding a piece of paper. Last week, someone wrote her a letter after reading an online blog post she made about a hard moment in her life; their words touched her, they said her story had brought them comfort, and it was awesome to realize her words had that kind of power, reminding her why she loves writing. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a note written to a person on a piece of paper. She expressed appreciation for Nate's kind words, saying that knowing her writing can make a difference keeps her going even on tough days, and that this outlet to share her stories and hopefully have an impact is valuable. 【Nate's Support】Session Date: August 14, 2022, 06:12 PM. Nate stated to Joanna that writing can be a path to solace and creativity and that an activity can become a part of our lives, and that she is inspiring; he asked whether writing is her route to solace and creativity. He added that it's really cool and that words can turn something sad into something special, expressed that it worked for her, and asked if anything cool has happened recently. He concluded that Joanna's work is nice, that it must feel sureal, and that she is changing lives.

【Script to Movie】On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna said she worked hard on another script and eventually created a plan for getting it made into a movie; the work was a ton but satisfying, she pitched it to some producers yesterday, and they really liked it, giving her a big confidence boost.  
On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate said, "Congrats on the chance to pitch your script - super impressive. Proud of you!" and shared an image: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table.  
On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna said, "Appreciate you, Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot to me. I feel like I just can't stop writing write now!" and shared an image: a photo of a pen and notebook on a table with a book. 【Midwestern Thriller】Midwestern Thriller — Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna told Nate that she is working on a new project—a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town, which has been a great creative outlet for her, and she asked whether he has any projects he's working on.

【Joanna's Road-Trip Film】Joanna's Road-Trip Film. Session Date: November 11, 2022. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna states she is finally filming her own movie from the road-trip script. An image shared by Joanna shows a person holding a clap board with a dog sleeping in a dog bed. At 12:06 AM on November 11, 2022, Nate congratulates Joanna, noting that her hard work paid off and that it must feel awesome to see her script come alive in a movie, and he asks for more details about the movie. An image shared by Nate shows a trophy and a game controller on a table. On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Joanna replies that it is pretty wild to see it come alive, that every day on set is awesome and full of potential, and that being able to show her vision is awesome. 【Joanna's Coolest Moment on Set】On November 11, 2022 at 12:06 AM, Nate said, "I think so too! What's been the coolest moment on set?" and shared an image of a fish tank with a fish inside. Joanna said that one of the actors came up to her and told her how much she liked her script, and she was excited, noting that it gave her chills.

【Joanna's Writing】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Nate complimented Joanna's work and asked if it is her third piece. Joanna confirmed it is her third piece, stating she chose to write about this because it's really personal; it's about loss, identity, and connection; it's a story she's had for ages but just got the guts to write, and it was hard, but she's proud of it. Nate said that sounds impressive and noted that she really does like writing about sadness and loss. Joanna affirmed this, explaining she had to be vulnerable and dig deep into those topics; she believes meaningful stories come from personal experiences and feelings; it was scary, but she found that she writes best when she's being true to herself—even if it's hard. Nate concluded that it takes guts to explore experiences and feelings, expressed pride in Joanna for staying strong and being true to herself, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna's Friends】Session Date: May 20, 2022. At 07:49 PM, Joanna stated that writing and creative projects are what get her through tough times and that she is grateful for her supportive friends. Nate replied that both activities can be therapeutic and that positive relationships can have a great impact. Joanna added that it is nice to have friends who understand and appreciate her work; it is priceless to discuss it together and receive feedback; she shared a look at what she has been working on, describing it as a journey and saying she has made it, along with an image described as a photo of a notepad with a dog on it and a pen. Joanna thanked Nate, saying his support means a lot and that having people cheering her on makes the journey easier. Nate concluded that she should keep going and reach for her dreams, noting that she has tons of talent and potential.

【Joanna's Movie Premiere】On October 25, 2022, at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna what's been up since they last chatted. Joanna replied that another movie script she contributed to was shown on the big screen last Sunday for the first time; it was such a surreal experience, she felt a mix of emotions but overall a satisfying moment, and she had been waiting for this for a long time. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a box of cards with a quote on it. Nate congratulated Joanna and asked how it was to finally see it on the big screen, sharing a photo holding a videogame controller; Image shared by Nate: a photo of a box with a controller inside of it. Joanna said: It was an amazing experience! I'll never forget seeing all of the characters and dialogue I wrote being acted out - it was such a cool feeling. Having all the hard work and determination I put into writing pay off was definitely rewarding. I know this is the third time it's happened, but its just so awesome! Nate asked: That must have been amazing. What was your favorite part of it? Joanna answered: Seeing my characters I worked so hard on come alive was my favorite part. It felt like they jumped off the page and became real - it was totally surreal. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a drawing book with a bunch of drawings on it. 【Joanna's Drawings】October 25, 2022, 08:16 PM: Nate complimented Joanna on her drawings and asked what inspired her to create them. Joanna replied that they are visuals of the characters to help bring them alive in her head so she can write better. 【Joanna's Idea Origins】Joanna's Idea Origins. Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM, Nate asked, "That's a cool way to gain insight into your characters. Where did you get your ideas for them?" At 08:16 PM, Joanna replied, "I got ideas from everywhere: people I know, stuff I saw, even what I imagined. It's cool to see how an idea takes shape into a person with their own wants, worries, and wishes." 【Joanna's Movie-Watching Plan】Session Date: October 25, 2022. On October 25, 2022 at 08:16 PM, Nate asked Joanna about the character on the left in the photo. Joanna replied, "You'll just have to watch the movie and find out for yourself." Nate stated he was already planning to watch it, and that discussing it made him want to watch it even more. 【Joanna & Nate: Personal Catch-Up】Session: Joanna & Nate — Personal Catch-Up; Session Date: October 25, 2022. At 08:16 PM on October 25, 2022, Joanna said: "Awesome! Well enough about me, what have you been up to?"

【Joanna】January 23, 2022, 02:01 PM: Joanna finished her first full screenplay and printed it last Friday; she had been working on it for a while, and it was a relief to have it done. Image shared by Joanna: a photography of a book with a page of text on it. Nate expressed excitement and asked what it's about. Joanna stated that the screenplay is a mix of drama and romance. 【Nate】On January 23, 2022, at 02:01 PM, Nate asked Joanna how she felt now that it's finished and whether she had any new plans for it. Joanna replied that she was experiencing a rollercoaster of emotions—relief, excitement, and some anxiety—over finishing this project, and that she planned to submit it to some film festivals and, hopefully, have producers and directors check it out. On the same day at 02:01 PM, Nate congratulated Joanna and expressed hope that they love it. Joanna replied that it was a mix of emotions and that she hoped for positive feedback and new opportunities.

【DIY bookmark】On October 06, 2022, at 11:15 AM, Joanna stated that she would cherish it and that she had finished a cute bookmark for one of the ladies at her writing club; an image shared by Joanna showed a bookmark with a plant on top of it. Nate said the bookmark is great and that he is sure she'll love it. Joanna stated that she absolutley loves DIYs, and that she knows the recipient does too. Nate asked to be told how it goes. Joanna replied, Sure thing.

【Content】[Session Date: June 24, 2022]

[June 24, 2022, 10:55 AM] Joanna submitted her recent screenplay to a film contest to see how others might like it.

3.mflow_response: A Midwestern small-town suspense thriller.

3.question: What is Nate creating for YouTube on 9 November, 2022?

memories.memory: 【Nate's YouTube gaming idea】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate stated that creating gaming content for YouTube is a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy his video game cravings when there aren’t any tournaments going on; image shared by Nate shows a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone. Joanna asked what inspired Nate to start making gaming videos. Nate replied that he is a big fan of gaming videos and thought it would be fun to start making them himself, hoping to share his love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too. 【Joanna's guidance】On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna acknowledged Nate's activity in making videos and connecting with people about gaming. Nate said it's new to him but he's excited to get started. Joanna advised him to watch other peoples videos first to understand what his audience likes, so his videos do not flop when posted. Nate stated that he is already doing that.

【YouTube Gaming Content】Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Nate stated that he is creating gaming content for YouTube, a cool way to entertain folks and satisfy his video game cravings when there aren't any tourneys going on; an image shared by Nate shows a desk with a computer, headphones, and a microphone. Joanna asked what inspired Nate to start making gaming videos. Nate replied that he is a big fan of gaming and thought it would be a fun idea to start making them himself, hoping to share his love of gaming and connect with others who enjoy it too. Joanna commented that Nate will do great, noting that making videos and connecting with people about gaming is awesome. Nate concluded that it's new to him but he's excited to get started. 【YouTube Audience Feedback】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM on November 09, 2022, Joanna stated: "Make sure you watch other peoples videos first so you get a handle on what your audience likes! That way your videos don't flop when you post them." An image shared by Joanna shows a photo of a computer screen displaying a product listing. At 05:54 PM on November 09, 2022, Nate stated: "Already doing that, but thanks for the advice!" An image shared by Nate shows a photo of a computer screen with a message on it.

【Nate's Gaming Outlook】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Nate reports that his game tournament was pushed back, he tried cooking, and shared a photo of homemade coconut ice cream with sprinkles that changed the color. Joanna comments that it looks yummy, she can’t try it right now, and asks how the last game tournament went. Nate says the tournament was tough and he didn’t make the finals; but that’s okay, he’ll get ’em next time. Joanna notes that it’s a bummer, but staying positive, and asks what his next move in gaming is. Nate says he’s thinking of joining a new gaming team after this next tourney, he’s had a few offers but hasn’t decided yet; it’s gonna be a big step, but he’s ready for a shake up. Joanna says making a switch could open up new opportunities and wishes him luck with picking the right team. Nate thanks her, says it’s a big decision but he’s excited for what the future holds, and asks what’s happening on her end.

【Nate's Gaming Week】On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Nate told Joanna that his game tournament was pushed back, leading him to try cooking; he shared a photo of homemade coconut ice cream with sprinkles that changed the color, showing a person scooping ice cream into a pan. Joanna replied that it looked yummy, she can’t try it right now, and asked how the last game tournament went. Nate responded that the tournament was tough and he didn’t make the finals but he’ll get them next time. Joanna encouraged staying positive and asked about his next move in gaming. Nate said he plans to join a new gaming team after the next tourney, has had a few offers but hasn’t decided yet; it’s a big step and he’s ready for a shake up. Joanna said making a switch could open up new opportunities and wished him luck with picking the right team. Nate concluded that it’s a big decision, but he’s excited for the future and asked how Joanna is doing and if anything exciting is happening on her end.

【Nate's international tournament victory】On August 22, 2022, at 10:57 AM, Nate announced that he had won an international tournament yesterday; it was wild, and gaming has brought him so much success and now he is able to make a living at something he is passionate about, and he loves it. Joanna congratulated Nate, saying she is proud of him for winning the tournament, that it's awesome, and that turning his passion into a career must feel great.

【Nate's Gaming Party】Session Date: June 03, 2022. At 05:44 PM on June 03, 2022, Nate stated he is organizing a gaming party two weekends later, and it will be hectic but fun. Joanna responded, "Sounds like fun, Nate! I wish you the best on your party. Have a blast!" 【Inviting Tournament Friends】On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Joanna asked, "Are you going to invite your tournament friends?", and Nate replied, "Definitely! And some old friends and teamates from other tournaments." 【Custom Controller Decorations】Custom Controller Decorations. Session Date: June 03, 2022. On June 03, 2022, at 05:44 PM, Nate told Joanna, "Thanks Joanna! I'm sure it'll be a blast. I'm even getting everyone custom controller decorations just for coming!" Joanna replied, "Wow, I bet they'll love that! What a sweet idea."

【Script to Movie】On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna said she worked hard on another script and eventually created a plan for getting it made into a movie; the work was a ton but satisfying, she pitched it to some producers yesterday, and they really liked it, giving her a big confidence boost.  
On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate said, "Congrats on the chance to pitch your script - super impressive. Proud of you!" and shared an image: a photo of a trophy and a game controller on a table.  
On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Joanna said, "Appreciate you, Nate! Your support and encouragement mean a lot to me. I feel like I just can't stop writing write now!" and shared an image: a photo of a pen and notebook on a table with a book. 【Midwestern Thriller】Midwestern Thriller — Session Date: November 09, 2022. On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna told Nate that she is working on a new project—a suspenseful thriller set in a small Midwestern town, which has been a great creative outlet for her, and she asked whether he has any projects he's working on.

【Turtles】Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Joanna asked Nate what made him get a third turtle. Nate responded that turtles bring him joy and peace and have such an effect on us; they are best buddies ever. He said he saw another at a pet store and had to get him; the tank is big enough now for three, so he figured why not. An image shared by Nate shows a turtle swimming in a tank with a metal bar. Nate stated he was very happy with the decision and wouldn't have it any other way. He added that he would give the turtles a bath before you get here so they're ready to play. 【Joanna's Visit】On November 09, 2022, at 05:54 PM, Joanna asked if she could come over sometime to watch him play with them from a distance, since she is allergic. Nate replied, Definitely! He would love to have her over again, and suggested watching one of her movies together or going to the park. Joanna replied, For sure, she’d love to do either of those things with him. 【Nate's Reflections】Session Date: November 09, 2022

On November 09, 2022 at 05:54 PM, Nate described nature's reminder to appreciate the beauty around us, stated that moments like those stay with you, and noted that these critters also make him appreciate life's little joys, adding that he has a new friend for them; an image shared by Nate shows three turtles sitting on a rock in a pond. On the same date and time, Joanna remarked that life is unpredictable and that just last week Nate would not have expected to be getting a third turtle this year. On the same date and time, Nate bid Joanna goodbye.

【Fort Wayne Sunset】[Fort Wayne Sunset] Session Date: November 09, 2022. At 05:54 PM, Joanna posted: "No worries, Nate! It's great to support each other in reaching our goals. On another note, check out this pic I got a while back!" The image shared by Joanna is a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background. At 05:54 PM, Nate replied: "Wow, that sunset pic looks incredible! What inspired you to take that photo?" At 05:54 PM, Joanna replied: "Thanks, Nate! I took that pic on a hike last summer near Fort Wayne. The sunset and the surrounding beauty were just incredible. It was an awesome reminder of nature's beauty."

【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？
[November 07, 2022, 08:10 PM] Nate: Hey Joanna! Hope 【Nate's Gaming Setup】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022 at 08:10 PM, Nate upgraded some of his equipment at home and shared an image of a desk with a computer monitor and a keyboard. Joanna asked whether he uses that computer for gaming. Nate replied, yes, this is where he practices and competes, and he sometimes uses it when playing games with friends. Joanna noted that having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help him stay focused. Nate stated that he loves it and that it's like his own little haven to escape into the virtual world, and shared an image of a desk with two monitors and a laptop. Joanna said it sounds great to have his own gaming setup at home; it must be awesome. Nate concluded that it really is and that it's also really important for his career, otherwise he would never be able to beat his competition, and shared an image of a pair of headphones and a video game controller. 【Xeonoblade Chronicles & Nintendo】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On November 07, 2022, at 08:10 PM, Joanna asked Nate what his favorite game was. Nate replied that he is currently playing the fantasy RPG Xeonoblade Chronicles and that it’s been a blast; he highly reccomend it if you’ve never played it before. Image shared by Nate: a photo of two nintendo game covers with a picture of a group of people. Joanna asked what made him start playing it and whether Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series. Nate confirmed that Xeonoblade Chronicles is a Japanese game series, said he is a big fan of Nintendo games, and explained that he had actually been wanting to play this one for a while because his friends have played it and reccomended it. Image shared by Nate: a photo of a woman in a costume holding a glass. Joanna noted that it’s nice when a friend’s reccomendation fits your taste well. Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a captain america costume on display in a museum. Nate concluded that it’s true, and that he loves when Joanna gives him movie reccomendations, usually liking them more then if he were to just watch some random one.

【The Lord of the Rings】Session Date: May 02, 2022. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Joanna said, "Hey Nate, how's it going? I took your reccomendation and watched "The Lord of the Rings" Trilogy last night! It was awesome!" Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a book openhemer. May 02, 2022, 11:54 AM: Nate replied, "Glad to hear you enjoyed it! memories.memory: 【Woodhaven】On July 10, 2022, at 02:34 PM, Joanna congratulated Nate on his success, stated that his hard work had paid off and encouraged him to keep it up, and noted that she had taken a road trip for research for her next movie as a much-needed break to explore new places and gain inspiration. Nate responded that her support meant a lot, expressed interest in her road trip, and asked where she went and whether she discovered any interesting places. Joanna then said she went to Woodhaven, a small town in the Midwest, where she enjoyed lovely scenery and historic buildings and visited the library, which had a cool old book collection, with an image showing a bookshelf filled with many books. Nate asked if she found any cool books there. Joanna replied that she stumbled upon a book from the 1900s with stories and sketches about the town and its people, with an image showing the book and a writing on it and a pen. Nate asked what stood out about it. Joanna stated that Woodhaven has had an interesting past with lots of cool people, and seeing how much it changed sparked ideas for her next script. Nate concluded that real-life stories are the best for inspiration, said he cannot wait to hear about her next one, and encouraged her to keep it up. 【Joanna】On July 10, 2022, at 02:34 PM, Joanna and Nate discussed a new screenplay: Joanna said the screenplay is different from her previous work but has the potential to be awesome and she will keep Nate posted; Nate responded that it should do as well as her last one and encouraged her to keep trying and believe in herself; Joanna said Nate's encouragement means a lot and that he is the best for supporting her writing journey; Nate said he is always here for her and that she has a lot of talent and should keep going. Joanna stated she started on a book recently since her movie did well, and there is an image: Image shared by Joanna: a photo of a person holding a notebook with a handwritten page; that page contains dialogues exploring loss, redemption, and forgiveness; the story is deep and emotional and she is really excited about it. Joanna said thanks; belief in me means a lot; I'll keep doing my best; thanks for the support. 【Valorant Career】会话日期：2022年11月7日，时间：20:10。Nate 表示在2022年11月5日的 Valorant 大型锦标赛决赛中获胜，看到自己的名字成为冠军是最棒的感觉，比赛确实会激发强烈情绪。他还表示最近在享受比赛并为其他锦标赛做准备，因此非常忙碌，但他很喜欢这份忙碌。Joanna 回复：听起来你现在真的很热爱生活！找到适合自己的事物很棒，忙碌有时会让人疲惫，但最终很有回报，继续保持。Joanna 发送了一张图片：一本带黑边、白色书名的书。Nate 表示每天都很感激能有一份自己喜欢的工作。顺便问，你最近有什么新鲜事吗？其实挺棒的！这些小家伙确实给我的生活带来快乐！看着它们很平静也很迷人。我真的很喜欢它们。你呢，Joanna？什么让你开心？

Joanna asked whether he uses that computer for gaming. Nate replied, yes, this is where he practices and competes, and he sometimes uses it when playing games with friends. Joanna noted that having a dedicated space for practice and competition should help him stay focused. Nate stated that he loves it and that it's like his own little haven to escape into the virtual world, and shared an image of a desk with two monitors and a laptop. Joanna said it sounds great to have his own gaming setup at home; it must be awesome. Nate concluded that it really is and that it's also really important for his career, otherwise he would never be able to beat his competition, and shared an image of a pair of headphones and a video game controller. 【Xeonoblade Chronicles & Nintendo】Session Date: November 07, 2022. On the same date and time, Nate bid Joanna goodbye.

【Fort Wayne Sunset Photo】November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Joanna shared an image—a photo of a sunflower in a field with a sunset in the background. November 09, 2022, 05:54 PM: Joanna replied that she took the pic on a hike last summer near Fort Wayne; the sunset and the surrounding beauty were incredible, a reminder of nature's beauty. memories.memory: 【Coconut Milk Ice Cream】[Coconut Milk Ice Cream] [Session Date: February 07, 2022] On February 07, 2022, at 09:27 AM, Nate discovered that he can make coconut milk ice cream and tried it; the ice cream was rich and creamy and might be his new favorite snack; an image shared by Nate shows a bowl of ice cream with a spoon in it. Joanna noted that it looked delish and asked what he thought. Nate said it was super good, rich and creamy, possibly his new favorite snack. Joanna asked if he would give it another go. Nate said it could be fun and that he looks forward to trying out different flavors and toppings. Nate also made a dairy-free chocolate cake with berries on it the other day. Joanna replied that it sounds yummy, complimented him, and said she should try making one or pay him a visit to try one. Nate agreed that it's always fun experimenting in the kitchen. 【Dairy-Free Flavors】Dairy-Free Flavors. Session Date: February 07, 2022.
